info.name: Konnektive CRM APIs
info.description:
[Konnektive](https://konnektive.com/) has developed the easiest to use and most intuitive shopping cart technology in the e-commerce industry. We have combined the best Customer Relationship Management (CRM) and Order Management System (OMS), with an easy-to-use shopping cart, and all of the necessary e-commerce technology that will make being an 'e-tailer' easier than ever. Gone are the days of tinkering with funky templates, and putting up with pre-factored designs that don't fully serve the unique needs of you and your company. You can build your web store with WordPress, the easiest web design application, and use our product and cart plugins to manage your orders. **All API calls** require a `loginId` and `password` . Obtain these and the API user in [Konnektive](https://help.konnektive.com/konnektive-crm/admin-setup/create-an-api-user). Since CRM API calls contain sensitive data, it is required that you use the HTTPS protocol. **Note:** 1. Requests sent using the HTTP GET method should be URL encoded. 2. The API application expects to receive data in the ASCII or UTF8 characters encodings.

Need some help?

We all need help sometimes. Get help now from our support superheroes, or share your knowledge to make things awesome.

request.description:
### Purpose

The Import Lead API allows you to add new leads to the CRM through a simple HTTP GET or POST request.

### Note

**Custom Fields**

Custom fields setup within the CRM campaign settings can also be imported with this api call. You do this by following these steps:

1. Take the field name and replace all spaces with underscores
    
2. Prefix the field name with the string "custom_"
    
3. Add the resulting string to the parameter list
    

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `address1` | String (max: 50 chars) | line 1 of customer billing address, should include street address and number | N |
| `address2` | String (max: 50 chars) | line 2 of customer billing address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N |
| `affId` | String char(10) | Konnektive affiliate Id for Online Campaigns | N |
| `billShipSame` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | If set indicates that shipping address fields are the same as billing address fields | N |
| `campaignId` | Integer | Campaign Id for which the order is being placed. | Y |
| `city` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's city | N |
| `companyName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's company | N |
| `country` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's billing country | N |
| `contactOptIn` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Send this value if the customer has opted in to receive sms communications | N |
| `emailOptIn` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Send this value if the customer has opted in to receive email communications | N |
| `marketingOptIn` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Customer has opted in to receive email and SMS communications | N |
| `taxExemption` | String (max 50 chars) | Send this value 'exempt' if the customer is exempt from tax calculations | N |
| `couponCode` | String (max 30 chars) | coupon code for order discount as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `custom1` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom2` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom3` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom4` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom5` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom_order_{field_name}` | String (max 500 chars) | Replace `{field_name}` with the Field Name you want to use for your Order. If a custom field with that name does not exist, it will be created. | N |
| `disableCustomerDedup` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | If set, this order will always create a new customer record.(Note: if either orderId or customerId is passed, this field will be ignored) | N |
| `dob` | DATE | customer's date of birth | N |
| `emailAddress` | customers email address | must be a valid email address format | Y- Online campaigns or Phone Number is not provided |
| `firstName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's first name | Y |
| `gender` | String (max: 1 char) | customer's gender (M or F) | N |
| `ipAddress` | customers ip address | Must be a valid ipv4 or ipv6 format | N |
| `lastName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's last name | Y |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api User Api Login Id | Y |
| `orderId` | String (max: 30 chars) | The orderId returned by a previous import lead call. Setting this will update the existing lead instead of creating a new record. | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api User password | Y |
| `phoneNumber` | customers phone number | may contain numeric digits and hyphens | Y- Online campaigns or Phone Number is not provided |
| `postalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's billing postal code | N |
| `product{i}_id` | Integer | campaign product Id (found on campaign page) | Y |
| `product{i}_qty` | Integer | quantity of product in order, defaults to quantity of 1 if not set | N |
| `product{i}_price` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | If set this will override the default shipping price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `product{i}_shipPrice` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | If set this will override the default shipping price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `variant{i}_id` | Integer | variant detail Id (found on product page) | N |
| `salesUrl` | String (max: 2000 chars) | Sales page URL | N |
| `sessionId` | String (max: 40 chars) | A sessionId returned by the import click call. | N |
| `shipAddress1` | String (max: 50 chars) | line 1 of customer shipping address, should include street address and number | N |
| `shipAddress2` | String (max: 50 chars) | line 2 of customer shipping address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N |
| `shipCity` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's shipping city | N |
| `shipCompanyName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's ship to company | N |
| `shipCountry` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's shipping country | N |
| `shipFirstName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's ship to first name | N |
| `shipLastName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's ship to last name | N |
| `shipPostalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's shipping postal code | N |
| `shipState` | char-2 or char-6 depending on country | customer's shipping state, abbreviated state code (varies from country to country) [View full List](#e7153cc7-cce9-4642-8ce4-f79be2a5cf83) | N |
| `sourceValue1` | String (max 200 chars) | affiliate subId for Online Campaigns | N |
| `sourceValue2` | String (max 200 chars) | affiliate subId for Online Campaigns | N |
| `sourceValue3` | String (max 200 chars) | affiliate subId for Online Campaigns | N |
| `state` | String (max: 6 chars) | customer's billing state, abbreviated state code (varies from country to country) [View full List](#e7153cc7-cce9-4642-8ce4-f79be2a5cf83) | N |
|  |  |  |  |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
  "result": "SUCCESS",
  "message": {
    "billShipSame": false,
    "customTaxSet": false,
    "shipmentInsured": false,
    "firstName": "Test",
    "lastName": "Robinson",
    "companyName": null,
    "address1": "4455 Hollywood Blvd",
    "address2": "Apt. 1120",
    "city": "Rome",
    "state": "NY",
    "country": "US",
    "postalCode": "00012",
    "shipFirstName": "Test",
    "shipLastName": "Robinson",
    "shipCompanyName": null,
    "shipAddress1": "4455 Hollywood Blvd",
    "shipAddress2": "Apt. 1120",
    "shipCity": "Rome",
    "shipState": "NY",
    "shipCountry": "US",
    "shipPostalCode": "00012",
    "emailAddress": "Robinson@email.net",
    "phoneNumber": "11233399",
    "campaignId": 13,
    "orderStatus": "PARTIAL",
    "orderType": "NEW_SALE",
    "agentUserId": 3137,
    "dateCreated": {
      "date": "2015-01-16 12:20:49.000000",
      "timezone_type": 3,
      "timezone": "America/New_York"
    },
    "customerId": 46611,
    "dateUpdated": "2015-01-16 12:20:49",
    "orderId": "C3E67A9BD0"
  }
}

 ```

request.description:
The Preauth Order API allows you to preauth a credit card for 1.00 on new orders before billing the final charges. This is usually called after Import Lead.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `address1` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 1 of customer billing address, should include street address and number | Y |
| `shipAddress1` | String (max: 30 chars) | ne 1 of customer shipping address, should include street address and number | N |
| `address2` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 2 of customer billing address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N |
| `shipAddress2` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 2 of customer shipping address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N |
| `cardExpiryDate` | Date (mm/yy or mm/yyyy) | credit card expiration date | Y |
| `cardNumber` | Integer (max: 16 digits)-- must be a valid credit card number | customer's credit card number | Y |
| `cardSecurityCode` | Integer (max: 4 digits) | credit card security code | Recommended |
| `city` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's city | Y |
| `shipCity` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's shipping city | N |
| `companyName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's company | N |
| `country` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's billing country | Y |
| `shipCountry` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's shipping country | N |
| `customerId` | Int (max 10 digits) | Id of the customer as assigned by Konnektive (Import Lead call) | Y if not passing orderId |
| `billerId` | Int (max of 10 digits) | BillerId that you want to pre-auth against | N |
| `emailAddress` | customers email address | must be a valid email address format | N |
| `firstName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's first name | Y |
| `ipAddress` | customers ip address | must be a valid ip format (xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx) | N |
| `lastName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's last name | Y |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `paySource` | Static 'CREDITCARD' | the pay source used for the purchase | Y |
| `phoneNumber` | customers phone number | may contain numeric digits and hyphens | N |
| `postalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's billing postal coshode | Y |
| `shipPostalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's shipping postal code | N |
| `state` | String (max: 6 chars) | customer's billing state, abbreviated state code (varies from country to country) [View full List](#e7153cc7-cce9-4642-8ce4-f79be2a5cf83) | Y |
| `shipState` | String (max: 6 chars) | customer's shipping state, abbreviated state code (varies from country to country) [View full List](#e7153cc7-cce9-4642-8ce4-f79be2a5cf83) | N |
| `orderId` | String (max 20 chars) | Id of the order as assigned by Konnektive (Import Lead call) | Y if not passing customerId |

### Test Card Fields

CardNumber: 0000000000000000

CardExpiryDate: any non-expired

CardSecurityCode: 100 - approved, 900 - declined, 800 - prepaid, 700 - debit

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Card is preauthorized"
}

 ```

#### Error

**Decline**

```
{
    "result": "ERROR",
    "message": "Transaction Declined: Invalid Credit Card Number"
}

 ```

**Missing Fields**

```
{
    "result": "ERROR",
    "message": "Order is already completed. Cannot preauthorize completed order."
}

 ```

The Order QA API allows you to approve or decline orders that are pending Quality Assurance.
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Require| |----------|-----------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|--------------------------------| | `action` | Enum 'APPROVE' or 'DECLINE' | If APPROVE, order will pass QA. If DECLINE, order will be rejected. | Y | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | | | `orderId` | String (max 30 chars) | orderId returned by the import order api call | Y | | | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | | ### Sample Response #### Success - APPROVE ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": "Order QA Approved" } ``` #### Success - DECLINE ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": "Order QA Declined" } ```

The Rerun Declined Sale API will allow you to retry billing of a declined transaction in a new sale.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `cbProtectionDays` | Int (max 10) | Use chargeback protection and hold the sale for the input amount of days. Cannot be used with isUpsale | N |
| `delayFulfillment` | Boolean | If using chargeback protection, also delay the fulfillment for the amount of days input in cbProtectionDays | N |
| `forceMerchantId` | String (max 30 chars) | billerId to use to rerun (will override item defaults) | N |
| `isUpsale` | Boolean | 1 for upsale decline, 0 for declined new sale | N |
| `orderId` | String (max 30 chars) | orderId returned by the import order api call | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `useDeclineMerchantId` | Boolean | 1 to use the declined biller to rerun | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Decline retry on order D121DBF1DE approved."
}

 ```

The Refund Order API will allow you to issue partial and full refunds against an order.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `fullRefund` | Boolean (true or false) | If set to true, a full refund will be issued on the order | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `orderId` | String (max 30 chars) | orderId returned by the import order api call | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `refundAmount` | Decimal | The dollar amount to refund | Y - if fullRefund is not set to 1 or if passing in cancelOrder=1 |
| `refundItemId` | Int | transactionItemId tied to the refund as returned by the order query or transaction query API call. For reporting purposes only | N |
| `refundReason` | String | Reason for why the order is refunded | N |
| `cancelOrder` | Boolean (true or false) | Cancels the order that is being refunded | Y - if fullRefund is not set to 1 |
| `cancelReason` | String | Reason for why the order is cancelled. | Y - if cancelOrder is set to 1 |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Refund Successful"
}

 ```

The Cancel Order API will cancel an existing order and optionally issue a refund.
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | |---------------|-------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------| | `afterNextBill` | Boolean (true or false) | If set, continuity purchases will be cancelled after the next scheduled billing | N | | `cancelReason` | String (max 100 chars) | Reason the order was cancelled | Y | | `fullRefund` | Boolean (true or false) | If set to true, a full refund will be issued on the order | N | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `orderId` | String (max 30 chars) | orderId returned by the import order api call | Y | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | ### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": "Order Cancelled" } ```

The Import Order API allows you to create new orders and bill customers through a simple http GET or POST request. ### Product Fields The following fields are used to set the products in the customer order: `product{i}_id`, `product{i}_qty`, `product{i}_price`, `product{i}_shipPrice`, where `{i}` is a sequential integer starting at the number 1 - 20. For 2 products in an order pass both `product1_id` and `product2_id`. For 3 products, pass `product1_id` , `product2_id` and `product3_id`. You are able to pass up to 20 products. ### Custom Fields Custom fields setup within the CRM campaign settings can also be imported with this api call. You do this by following these steps: 1. Take the field name and replace all spaces with underscores 2. Prefix the field name with the string "custom_" 3. Add the resulting string to the parameter list #### (EXAMPLES) "Pets Name" "custom_Pets_Name" "Drivers License Number" "custom_Drivers_License_Number" "hobbies" "custom_hobbies" ### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | `address1` | String (max: 50 chars) | line 1 of customer billing address, should include street address and number | Y | | `address2` | String (max: 50 chars) | line 2 of customer billing address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N | | `billShipSame` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | If set indicates that shipping address fields are the same as billing address fields | N | | `cardNumber` | Integer (max: 16 digits)-- must be a valid credit card number | customer's credit card number | Y - when paySource is 'CREDITCARD' | | `city` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's city | Y | | `companyName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's company | N | | `country` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's billing country | Y | | `customerId` | String (max: 30 chars) | The customerId of an existing CRM customer. This parameter is useful when using paySource=ACCTONFILE | N | | `dateCreated` | DATE | The date the order was created | N | | `dob` | DATE | customer's date of birth | N | | `emailAddress` | customers email address | must be a valid email address format | Y- Online campaigns | | `firstName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's first name | Y | | `gender` | String (max: 1 char) | customer's gender (M or F) | N | | `ipAddress` | customers ip address | Must be a valid ipv4 or ipv6 format | Y- Online campaigns
N- Phone campaigns | | `lastName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's last name | Y | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `orderId` | String (max: 30 chars) | The orderId returned by a previous import lead call. If passed, address and other values created with Import Lead do not need to be passed again. | N | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | | `paySource` | Enum
('CREDITCARD','PAYPAL','CHECK','ACCTONFILE',
'COD','DIRECTDEBIT','PREPAID','APPLEPAY',
'GOOGLEPAY') | the pay source used for the purchase.
CREDITCARD - pay with card
CHECK - pay with eCheck
ACCTONFILE - primay pay source associated with the customer account
COD - Cash on Delivery
DIRECTDEBIT - pay with Direct Debit account
PREPAID - payment taken outside konnektive system
APPLEPAY - payment taken externally through Apple Pay
GOOGLEPAY - payment taken externally through Google Pay
PAYPAL - payment taken externally through PayPal | Y | | `phoneNumber` | customers phone number | may contain numeric digits and hyphens | Y- Phone campaigns | | `postalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's billing postal code | N | | `salesUrl` | String (max: 2000 chars) | Sales page URL | N | | `sessionId` | String (max: 40 chars) | A sessionId returned by the import click call. | N | | `shipAddress1` | String (max: 50 chars) | line 1 of customer shipping address, should include street address and number | Y - billShipSame is false | | `shipAddress2` | String (max: 50 chars) | line 2 of customer shipping address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N | | `shipCity` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's shipping city | Y - when billShipSame is false | | `shipCompanyName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's ship to company | N | | `shipCountry` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's shipping country | Y - when billShipSame is false | | `shipFirstName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's ship to first name | Y - when billShipSame is false | | `shipPostalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's shipping postal code | Y - when billShipSame is false | | `shipState` | char-2 or char-6 depending on country | customer's shipping state, abbreviated state code (varies from country to country) [View full List](https://) | Y - when billShipSame is false | | `state` | String (max: 6 chars) | customer's billing state, abbreviated state code (varies from country to country) [View full List](https://) | Y | | `accountHolder` | String (max: 50 chars) | Name of Direct Debit account holder | Y - when paySource is 'DIRECTDEBIT' | | `achAccountNumber` | Integer (max digits 14) | account number of customer's ach account | Y - when paySource is 'CHECK' | | `achAccountType` | Enum ('CHECKING' OR 'SAVINGS') | account type of customer's ach account | Y - when paySource is 'CHECK' | | `achRoutingNumber` | Integer (9 digits) | bank routing number, must be a valid routing number | Y - when paySource is 'CHECK' | | `affId` | String char(10) | Konnektive affiliate Id for Online Campaigns | N | | `campaignId` | Integer | Campaign Id for which the order is being placed. | Y | | `cardMonth` | Date (mm) | credit card month of expiration | Y - when paySource is 'CREDITCARD' | | `cardSecurityCode` | Integer (max: 4 digits) | credit card security code | N - but most gateways require it | | `cardYear` | Date (yyyy) | credit card year of expiration | Y - when paySource is 'CREDITCARD' | | `cavv` | String (max 50 chars) | Cardholder Authentication Verification Value: a 3DS value that the CRM will pass through to the processor if provided | N | | `contactOptIn` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Send this value if the customer has opted in to receive sms communications | N | | `emailOptIn` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Send this value if the customer has opted in to receive email communications | N | | `marketingOptIn` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Customer has opted in to receive email and SMS communications | N | | `couponCode` | String (max 30 chars) | coupon code for order discount as setup in Konnektive CRM | N | | `custom1` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N | | `custom2` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N | | `custom3` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N | | `custom4` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N | | `custom5` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N | | `customDescriptor` | String (max 45 chars) | A transaction descriptor to pass to the gateway. This will override the value on the gateway setup in CRM | N | | `custom_order_{field_name}` | String (max 500 characters) | Replace `{field_name}` with the Field Name you want to use for your order. If a custom field with that name does not exist, it will be created | N | | `ddbic` | String (max: 15 chars) | BIC (Bank Identifier Code) | Y - when paySource is 'DIRECTDEBIT' | | `disableCustomerDedup` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | If set, this order will always create a new customer record.
(Note: if either orderId or customerId is passed, this field will be ignored) | N | | `eci` | String (max 5 chars) | E-commerce Indicator: a 3DS value that the CRM will pass through to the processor if provided | N | | `errorRedirectsTo` | String (max 300 chars) | Indicates where the bank should redirect the customer on a failed 3DS transaction | Y - if you are using 3DS process flow | | `forceMerchantId` | Integer | merchantId from konnektive CRM. Transactions will run against the specified merchant. | N | | `forceQA` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | If set, places order into Quality Assurance | N | | `iban` | String (max: 40 chars) | IBAN (International Bank Account Number) | Y - when paySource is 'DIRECTDEBIT' | | `insureShipment` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Charges Shipping Insurance according to CRM configuration | N | | `shipmentInsurancePrice` | Decimal - 2 Decimal precision. | This is the price of shipment insurance if calculated by your shipping insurance vendor. | N | | `maintainCustomerCategory` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | If set, this order will use the same subaccount and/or MID category of the customer's last successful order | N | | `preAuthBillerId` | Integer | merchantId from konnektive CRM | Y - on preauthed transactions | | `preAuthMerchantTxnId` | String (max: 30 chars) | The transactionId returned by the processor for the preauth transaction | Y - on preauthed transactions | | `product{i}_id` | Integer | campaign product Id (found on campaign page) | Y | | `product{i}_price` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N | | `product{i}_qty` | Integer | quantity of product in order, defaults to quantity of 1 if not set | N | | `product{i}_shipPrice` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default shipping price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N | | `variant{i}_id` | Integer | variant detail Id (found on product page) | N | | `rebill_cavv` | String (max 50 chars) | Cardholder Authentication Verification Value: a 3DS value that the CRM will pass through to the processor on the first rebill if provided | N | | `rebill_eci` | String (max 5 chars) | E-commerce Indicator: a 3DS value that the CRM will pass through to the processor on the first rebill if provided | N | | `rebill_xid` | String (max 50 chars) | Cardholder Authentication Transaction Id: a 3DS value that the CRM will pass through to the processor on the first rebill if provided | N | | `redirectsTo` | String (max 300 chars) | Indicates where the bank should redirect the customer on a successful 3DS transaction | Y - if you are using 3DS process flow | | `salesTax` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default sales tax | N | | `salesUrl` | String (max 2000 chars) | The Url of your landing page. Required by some gateways. | N | | `shipLastName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's ship to last name | Y - when billShipSame is false | | `shipProfileId` | Integer | Ship profile id of a shipping profile as setup in Konnektive CRM | N | | `signature` | Image Data URI (PNG/base64 encoded) | This is an image of a client-provided contract signature.
Example:
"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEU.."

Error **Decline** ``` { "result": "ERROR", "message": "Transaction Declined: Invalid Credit Card Number" } ``` **Missing Fields** ``` { "result": "ERROR", "message": { "address1": "is a required field", "city": "is a required field", "state": "is a required field" } } ``` ### 3DS Instructions

The 3DS process involves sending the user to or opening an iframe for the customer's bank page where they enter additional security information to verify their identity. 3DS is a more complicated transaction flow than your standard order import requests, but the benefit is that it is both more secure and more difficult to chargeback as fraud.

To begin a 3DS process flow, first send the standard order import request. Not all cards are 3DS enabled and will simply process through the normal way. 3DS cards, on the other hand, will return a special response code that indicates you will need to take additional action to process the sale.

Konnektive has two different 3DS response types:

#### 1\. 3DS redirect URL response This response indicates that the user's browser should be redirected to a specific URL ``` { "result": "MERC_REDIRECT", "message": { "url": "https:\/\/redirecttheuserhere.com" } } ``` #### 2\. 3DS javascript response This response indicates that the user's browser should execute the supplied javascript. [The JS eval function can be used for this](https://) ``` { "result": "MERC_REDIRECT", "message": { "script": "var iframe=document.createElement(\\'IFRAME\\');iframe.innerHTML=..." } } ``` On completion of the 3DS process, one of 2 events will occur: ##### 1\. 3DS Failure On failure, the user will be redirected back to the URL provided in the "errorRedirectsTo" parameter. Additionally, the errorMsg parameter will be sent as part of the URL query string Ex. GET [https://mysalesPage.com/lander/index.php?errorMsg=Description+of+bank+error](https://) ##### 2.3DS Success On success, the user browser will initiate a POST request to the URL provided in the "redirectsTo" parameter. The request will contain two POST parameters: finalizeTransaction=1&orderData={}, which contains the same json-encoded response information as a successful non-3DS Import Order request.

request.description:
The Order Sales Tax API allows you to compute tax for new orders with a tax service plugin through a simple HTTPS GET or POST request.

### Product Fields

The following fields are used to set the products in the customer order: `product{i}_id`, `product{i}_qty`, `product{i}_price`, `product{i}_shipPrice`, where `{i}` is a sequential integer starting at the number 1.

For 2 products in an order pass both `product1_id` and `product2_id`.

For 3 products, pass `product1_id`, `product2_id`, and `product3_id`.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `campaignId` | Integer | Checkout Champ hexidecimal campaignId for which the order is being checked placed. | Y |
| `couponCode` | String (max 30 chars) | coupon code for order discount as setup in Checkout Champ | N |
| `firstName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's first name | N |
| `lastName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's last name | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Checkout Champ | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Checkout Champ | Y |
| `product{i}_id` | Integer | campaign product Id (found on campaign page) | Y |
| `product{i}_price` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default price as setup in Checkout Champ | N |
| `product{i}_qty` | Integer | quantity of product in order, defaults to quantity of 1 if not set | N |
| `product{i}_shipPrice` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default shipping price as setup in Checkout Champ | N |
| `variant{i}_id` | Integer | variant detail Id (found on product page) | N |
| `shipAddress1` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 1 of customer shipping address, should include street address and number | Y |
| `shipAddress2` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 2 of customer shipping address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N |
| `shipCity` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's shipping city | Y |
| `shipCountry` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's shipping country | Y |
| `shipPostalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's shipping postal code | Y (when using a tax plugin) |
| `shipState` | char-2 or char-6 depending on country | customer's shipping state, abbreviated state code (varies from country to country) [View full List](#e7153cc7-cce9-4642-8ce4-f79be2a5cf83) | Y |
| `taxExemption` | Tax Exemption Number | if set and it matches a Certificate Number, sales tax will be processed as tax exempt | N |
| `getVatPrices` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Return the product prices with tax | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "0.00"
}

```

#### Error

**Invalid Address**

```
{
    "result": "ERROR",
    "message": "Unable to determine the taxing jurisdictions.\""
}

```

**Missing Fields**

```
{
    "result": "ERROR",
    "message": " Missing complete shipping contact and address data\""
}

```

The Order Surcharge API allows you to compute surcharge for new orders with a surcharge plugin through a simple http GET or POST request.

### Product Fields

The following fields are used to set the products in the customer order: `product{i}_id`, `product{i}_qty`, `product{i}_price`, `product{i}_shipPrice`,`product{i}_salesTax`, where `{i}` is a sequential integer starting at the number 1.  
  
For 2 products in an order pass both `product1_id` and `product2_id`.  
  
For 3 products, pass `product1_id`, `product2_id`, and `product3_id`.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `cardNumber` | Integer (max: 16 digits)-- must be a valid credit card number | customer's credit card number | Y |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `mode` | String (max: 4 chars) | CALC=calculate surcharge, CAP=capture surcharge | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `postalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's billing postal code | Y |
| `product{i}_id` | Integer | campaign product Id (found on campaign page) | Y |
| `product{i}_price` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `product{i}_qty` | Integer | quantity of product in order, defaults to quantity of 1 if not set | N |
| `product{i}_salesTax` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | sales tax for this item | N |
| `product{i}_shipPrice` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default shipping price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `shipPostalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's shipping postal code | Y |
| `sTxnId` | String (max: 20 chars) | surcharge transaction id to capture | Y- for mode CAP |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "0.00"
}

```

#### Error

##### Invalid:

```
{
    "result": "ERROR",
    "message": " Surcharge service plugin must be enabled to calculate surcharge"
}

```

##### Missing Fields:

```
{
    "result": "ERROR",
    "message": "cardNumber is required to calculate surcharge"
}

```

#### Unknown

```
{
    "result": "UNKNOWN",
    "message": "Unable to calculate surcharge at this time. Surcharge will be calculated at time of sale."
}

```

request.description:
The Update Fulfillment API will allow you to update fulfillment information through a simple HTTPS GET or POST request.

#### Additional Notes:

#### Splitting a Fulfillment

To split a fulfillment, pass in 'SPLIT' in the fulfillmentStatus and the fulfillmentItemIds of the items to be split from the fulfillment. The quantity of the items being split cannot be modified from the original fulfillment.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `codUndeliveredStatus` | String (max 32 chars) | undelivered status of COD fulfillment (REATTEMPT and PICKUP will produce a soft decline and leave the order in COD_PENDING status. DECLINED and any other status will produce a hard decline, decline the order, and cancel the fulfillment | Y - if marking Cash on Delivery (COD) orders as undelivered |
| `dateDelivered` | Date (mm/dd/yyy) | delivery date of fulfillment | Y - if fulfillmentStatus is set to DELIVERED |
| `dateReturned` | Date (mm/dd/yyyy) | return date of fulfillment | Y - if fulfillmentStatus is set to RETURNED |
| `dateShipped` | Date (mm/dd/yyyy) | shipping date of fulfillment | Y - if fulfillmentStatus is set to SHIPPED |
| `declineReason` | String (max 32 chars) | reason that COD Order was declined | N |
| `deliveryConfirmation` | String (max 32 chars) | delivery confirmation number of fulfillment | Y - if fulfillmentStatus is set to DELIVERED |
| `fulfillmentId` | Integer (max 16 digits) | fulfillmentId returned by the query order api call | Y - if orderId not set |
| `fulfillmentHouseId` | Integer (max 16 digits) | fulfillmentHouseId returned by the fulfillment query api call. If fulfillment's fulfillment house is updated, no other updates to the fulfillment will occur on the same API call. Pass in 0 to change the fulfillment house to System Fulfillment | N |
| `fulfillmentItem{i}_Id` | Integer (max 16 digits) | fulfillmentItemId returned by the query order api call | Y - if marking a fulfillment as RMA_PENDING or SPLIT or updating quantity, sku, or adding products |
| `fulfillmentItem{i}_qty` | Integer (max 16 digits) | fulfillment item quantity used to update fulfillment record | N |
| `fulfillmentItem{i}_sku` | String (max 50 chars) | fulfillment item sku used to update fulfillment record | N |
| `fulfillmentStatus` | ENUM- `'PENDING'/'SHIPPED'/'DELIVERED'/'RMA_PENDING'/'RETURNED'/'CANCELLED'/'SPLIT'` | status of fulfillment | Y - if updating fulfillment |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `orderId` | String (max 32 chars) | orderId returned by the import order api call | Y - if fulfillmentId not set |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `product{i}_id` | Integer (max 16 digits) | Actual productId of the product to add. This is not the campaign product. | Y - if adding products to a fulfillment |
| `refundAmount` | Decimal | The dollar amount to refund | Y - if fulfillmentStatus is set to RMA_PENDING |
| `reshipOnReturn` | Boolean (1 or 0) | If set indicates that the fulfillment item will be reshipped to the customer once it has been returned | N |
| `rmaNumber` | String (max 32 chars) | rma number of fulfillment | Y - if fulfillmentStatus is set to RMA_PENDING |
| `shipCarrier` | String (max 32 chars) | name of shipping carrier | N |
| `shipMethod` | String (max 32 chars) | shipping method of fulfillment | N |
| `trackingNumber` | String (max 32 chars) | tracking number of fulfillment | Y - if fulfillmentStatus is set to SHIPPED |
| `variant{i}_id` | Integer (max 16 digits) | Variant Id of the product to add. This must be used with product{i}_id | N |
| `reship` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Use this flag to initiate a reship on an order. Pass fulfillmentItem{i}_Id to reship a specific product, not supplied all items will be reshipped. | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

##### fulfillmentStatus: SHIPPED

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Order marked as Shipped"
}

 ```

##### fulfillmentStatus: RMA_PENDING

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Order marked as Rma Pending"
}

 ```

##### fulfillmentStatus: RETURNED

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Order marked as Returned"
}

 ```

##### fulfillmentStatus: CANCELLED

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Order marked as Cancelled"
}

 ```

The Query Fulfillment API will allow you to query fulfillment information through a simple HTTPS POST request.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `company` | string (max 32 chars) | The title of the fulfillment house | N |
| `endDate` | string (mm/dd/yy) | only records falling on or before this date | Y - if `orderId`, `customerId`, and `fulfillmentId` are not set |
| `endTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour time format) | Only records falling on or before this time. Must include endDate if passing this value. | N |
| `dateRangeType` | ENUM - dateCreated, dateUpdated, dateExported, dateDelivered, or dateShipped' | Defaults to dateCreated | N |
| `fulfillmentId` | Integer (max 16 digits) | fulfillmentId returned by the Query Order API call | N |
| `customerId` | Integer (max 16 digits) | customerId returned by the Query Customer API call | N |
| `fulfillmentHouseId` | Integer (max 16 digits) | The id of the fulfillment house | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `orderId` | String (max 32 chars) | orderId returned by the Import Order API call | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `startDate` | Date (mm/dd/yy) | only records falling on or after this date | Y - if `orderId`, `customerId`, and `fulfillmentId` are not set |
| `startTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour time format) | Only records falling on or after this time. Must include startDate if passing this value. | N |
| `trackingNumber` | String (max 32 chars) | Tracking number of fulfillment | N |
| `status` | ENUM - HOLD, PENDING, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED, RETURNED, FAILED, RMA_PENDING, FREEZE, RECYCLE, PENDING_SHIPMENT | The status of the fulfillment | N |

request.description:
The Confirm Order API will immediately send confirmation auto responder emails to the customer.

Calling Import Click from a Thank You page will also send confirmation auto responder emails to the customer.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `orderId` | String (max 30 chars) | orderId returned by the import order api call | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS"
}

 ```

The Query Order API returns information about existing orders. No wildcard characters need to be used as the api will insert wildcards automatically when necessary. ### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | `address1` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 1 of customer billing address, should include street address and number | N | | `address2` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 2 of customer billing address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N | | `campaignId` | Int | The numeric Konnektive campaign id | N | | `campaignProductId` | Int | The numeric Konnektive campaign product id | N | | `campaignCategoryName` | String (max: 50 chars) | The Konnektive campaign category name. This search shows results that include your query. | N | | `city` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's city | N | | `companyName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's company | N | | `country` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's billing country | N | | `dateRangeType` | ENUM - dateCreated or dateUpdated | defaults to dateCreated | N | | `emailAddress` | must be a valid email address format | customers email address | N | | `endDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or before this date | Y - if orderId or customerId is not passed | | `endTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or before this time. Must include endDate if passing this value. | N | | `exTestCards` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Exclude test cards | N | | `firstName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's first name | N | | `fulfillmentId` | String | FulfillmentId tied to the order | N | | `includeClicks` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Include the number of clicks within the date range. Requires both startDate and endDate. Times are optional. Successful response will include a "clicks" value. | N | | `includeCustomFields` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Return any custom fields on the order | N | | `ipAddress` | must be a valid ip format (xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx) | customers ip address | N | | `isDeclineSave` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Whether or not an order was completed due to a call center save | N | | `lastName` | String (max: 50 chars) | Customer's last name | N | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `orderId` | String (max 30 chars) | orderId returned by the import order api call | N | | `orderStatus` | ENUM- `'COMPLETE'/`
`'SALE'/'PARTIAL'/ 'DECLINED'/ 'REFUNDED'/'PARTIAL_REFUNDED'/ 'CANCELLED'/'COD_PENDING'` | The order status.
Use SALE to filter on COMPLETE, REFUNDED, CANCELLED and PENDING statuses | N | | `page` | Integer | which page of the query results to return | N | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | | `phoneNumber` | may contain numeric digits and hyphens | customers phone number | N | | `postalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's billing postal code | N | | `exactEmailMatch` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | only records with exact matching email address | N | | `exactPhoneMatch` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | only records with exact matching phone number | N | | `resultsPerPage` | Integer (max:200) | Number of results to return (defaults to 25) | N | | `showExternal` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | includes orders imported from an external source | N | | `startDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or after this date | Y - if orderId or customerId is not passed | | `startTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or after this time. Must include startDate if passing this value. | N | | `state` | char-2 or char-6 depending on country | customer's billing state, 2 character ISO codes for US states, foreign countries use country iso code + 3 digit number | N | | `orderType` | ENUM('NEW_SALE','RECURRING') | | N | | `utmCampaign` | String | Identifies a specific product promotion or strategic campaign. | N | | `utmContent` | String | Identifies what specifically was clicked to bring the user to the site, such as a banner ad or a text link. It is often used for A/B testing and content-targeted ads. | N | | `utmMedium` | String | Identifies what type of link was used, such as email or pay-per-click advertising. | N | | `utmSource` | String | Identifies which site sent the traffic, and is a required parameter. | N | | `utmTerm` | String | Identifies search terms. | N | ### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", request.description:
The Import Upsale API allows you bill and add upsales to existing orders through a simple http GET or POST request.

### Product Fields

The following fields are used to set the products in the customer order: `product{i}_id`, `product{i}_qty`, `product{i}_price`, `product{i}_shipPrice`, where `{i}` is a sequential integer starting at the number 1 - 50.

For 2 products in an order pass both `product1_id` and `product2_id`.

For 3 products, pass `product1_id` , `product2_id` and `product3_id`.

You are able to pass up to 50 products.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `cavv` | String (max 50 chars) | Cardholder Authentication Verification Value: a 3DS value that the CRM will pass through to the processor if provided | N |
| `customDescriptor` | String (max 45 chars) | A transaction descriptor to pass to the gateway. This will override the value on the gateway setup in CRM. | N |
| `eci` | String (max 5 chars) | E-commerce Indicator: a 3DS value that the CRM will pass through to the processor if provided | N |
| `errorRedirectsTo` | String (max 300 chars) | Indicates where the bank should redirect the customer on a failed 3DS transaction | Y - if you are using 3DS process flow |
| `forceMerchantId` | Integer | merchantId from konnektive CRM. Transactions will run against the specified merchant. | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `orderId` | String (max 32 chars) | orderId returned from Import Order Call | Y |
| `couponCode` | String (max 30 chars) | coupon code for order discount as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `productId` | Integer | cproduct Id of upsale | Y |
| `productPrice` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `productQty` | Integer | quantity of upsale, defaults to quantity of 1 if not set | N |
| `productSalesTax` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will be added to any existing sales tax for the current order | N |
| `productShipPrice` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default shipping price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `variantDetailId` | Integer | variant detail Id of upsale | N |
| `product{i}_id` | Integer | campaign product Id (found on campaign page). use this if including multiple products on the upsell. | N |
| `product{i}_qty` | Integer | quantity of upsale, defaults to quantity of 1 if not set. use this if including multiple products on the upsell. | N |
| `product{i}_price` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `product{i}_shipPrice` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default shipping price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `variant{i}_id` | Integer | variant detail Id (found on product page). use this if including multiple products on the upsell. | N |
| `rebill_cavv` | String (max 50 chars) | Cardholder Authentication Verification Value: a 3DS value that the CRM will pass through to the processor on the first rebill if provided | N |
| `rebill_eci` | String (max 5 chars) | E-commerce Indicator: a 3DS value that the CRM will pass through to the processor on the first rebill if provided | N |
| `rebill_xid` | String (max 50 chars) | Cardholder Authentication Transaction Id: a 3DS value that the CRM will pass through to the processor on the first rebill if provided | N |
| `redirectsTo` | String (max 300 chars) | Indicates where the bank should redirect the customer on a successful 3DS transaction | Y - if you are using 3DS process flow |
| `replaceProductId` | Integer | cproduct Id of previously selected offer in order. If passed, upsell will replace the existing offer. | N |
| `skipQA` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | If set, skips Quality Assurance for order that would have otherwise been placed into Quality Assurance. | N |
| `xid` | String (max 50 chars) | Cardholder Authentication Transaction Id: a 3DS value that the CRM will pass through to the processor if provided | N |
| `applePayToken` | String (max 5000 chars) | Apple Pay Payment Token returned from Apple Pay SDK | N (Y - if paySource ='PREPAID' and prepaidType='APPLEPAY') |
| `googlePayToken` | String (max 5000 chars) | Google Pay Payment Token returned from Google Pay SDK | N (Y - if paySource ='PREPAID' and prepaidType='GOOGLEPAY') |

### Sample Response

#### Success


request.description:
The Update Order API allows you to update an existing CRM order through a simple HTTP GET or POST request.

### Custom Order Fields

Customer order fields can be updated/deleted for your order. If you had a custom field named "Dog" you can update the value by adding `custom_order_Dog=Snuffles` to the query parameters. This value can be modified as well as removed by sending a `null` value. An example of this would be: `custom_order_Dog=` and that will delete the custom order field.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `address1` | String (max: 50 chars) | line 1 of customer billing address, should include street address and number | N |
| `address2` | String (max: 50 chars) | line 2 of customer billing address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N |
| `affId` | String char(10) | Konnektive affiliate Id for Online Campaigns | N |
| `billShipSame` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | If set indicates that shipping address fields are the same as billing address fields | N |
| `city` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's city | N |
| `companyName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's company | N |
| `country` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's billing country | N |
| `custom1` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom2` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom3` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom4` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom5` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom_order_{fieldName}` | String (max 500 characters) | Replace `{field_name}` with the Field Name you want to use for your order. If a custom field with that name does not exist, it will be created | N |
| `emailAddress` | customers email address | must be a valid email address format | N |
| `firstName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's first name | N |
| `lastName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's last name | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `orderId` | String (max: 30 chars) | The orderId returned by Import Order call | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `phoneNumber` | customers phone number | may contain numeric digits and hyphens | N |
| `postalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's billing postal code | N |
| `shipAddress1` | String (max: 50 chars) | line 1 of customer shipping address, should include street address and number | N |
| `shipAddress2` | String (max: 50 chars) | line 2 of customer shipping address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N |
| `shipCity` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's shipping city | N |
| `shipCompanyName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's ship to company | N |
| `shipCountry` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's shipping country | N |
| `shipFirstName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's ship to first name | N |
| `shipLastName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's ship to last name | N |
| `shipPostalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's shipping postal code | N |
| `shipState` | char-2 or char-6 depending on country | customer's shipping state, abbreviated state code (varies from country to country) [View full List](#e7153cc7-cce9-4642-8ce4-f79be2a5cf83) | N |
| `sourceValue1` | String (max 200 chars) | affiliate subId for Online Campaigns | N |
| `sourceValue2` | String (max 200 chars) | affiliate subId for Online Campaigns | N |
| `sourceValue3` | String (max 200 chars) | affiliate subId for Online Campaigns | N |
| `state` | String (max: 6 chars) | customer's billing state, abbreviated state code (varies from country to country) [View full List](#e7153cc7-cce9-4642-8ce4-f79be2a5cf83) | N |
| `validateAddress` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Allows force-validation of addresses for orders | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Order Updated"
}

 ```

The Order Ship Rate API allows you to compute shipping rates for new orders with the ShipEngine or OpenBorder Plugin through a simple http GET or POST request.

**Purpose**

The purpose of this endpoint is to obtain custom shipping rate from ShipEngine's Rating API. In order to use this properly you must have the ShipEngine plugin enabled and have valid carrierIds set in the plugin.

Alternatively, users without ShipEngine integrations can pass their campaignId and shipProfileId for a particular product.

Below is a high level flow of how to use this endpoint with ShipEngine:

1. Send a request to this endpoint using the data dictionary below.
2. The response will contain various shipping rates, carriers, and ship methods. Pick the one(s) that you want to offer on your page from the response.
3. Display to card holder, and on import order pass in the selected carrier,method,and price as shipCarrier, shipMethod, and product{i}_shipPrice
    

The flow of how to use this endpoint without ShipEngine is as follows:

1. Send a request to this endpoint using the data dictionary below.
2. The response will show the amount, carrier, and shipping method specified in your shipping profile. Choose how to display this on your page.
3. Display to card holder, and on import order pass in the selected carrier, method, and price as shipCarrier, shipMethod, and product{i}_shipPrice
    

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `campaignId` | Integer | The numeric konnektive campaign id | Y - If company does not have a ShipEngine integration. |
| `product{i}_id` | Integer | campaign product Id (found on campaign page) | Y |
| `product{i}_qty` | Integer | quantity of product in order, defaults to quantity of 1 if not set | Y |
| `shipAddress1` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 1 of customer shipping address, should include street address and number | Y |
| `shipFirstName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's ship to first name | Y |
| `shipLastName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's ship to last name | Y |
| `shipCity` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's shipping city | Y |
| `shipCountry` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's shipping country | Y |
| `shipPostalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's shipping postal code | Y |
| `shipProfileId` | Integer | Ship profile id of a shipping profile as setup in Konnektive CRM | Y - If company does not have a ShipEngine integration. |
| `shipState` | char-2 or char-6 depending on country | customer's shipping state, abbreviated state code (varies from country to country) [View full List](#e7153cc7-cce9-4642-8ce4-f79be2a5cf83) | Y |

The Order Coupon API allows you to calculate discounts through a simple http GET or POST request.

### Product Fields

The following fields are used to set the products in the customer order: `product{i}_id`, `product{i}_qty`, `product{i}_price`, `product{i}_shipPrice`, where `{i}` is a sequential integer starting at the number 1.  
  
For 2 products in an order pass both `product1_id` and `product2_id`.  
  
For 3 products, pass `product1_id` , `product2_id` and `product3_id`.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `loginId` | string (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `password` | string (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `campaignId` | Integer | Campaign Id for which the order is being placed. | Y |
| `couponCode` | String (max 200 chars) | coupon code for order discount as setup in Konnektive CRM | Y |
| `shipProfileId` | Integer | Ship profile id of a shipping profile as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `shipState` | char-2 or char-6 depending on country | customer's shipping state, abbreviated state code (varies from country to country) [View full List](#e7153cc7-cce9-4642-8ce4-f79be2a5cf83) | N |
| `shipCountry` | STR30 | customer's shipping country | N |
| `shipCarrier` | STR20 |  | N |
| `shipMethod` | STR20 |  | N |
| `shipUpcharge` | DECIMAL |  | N |
| `product{i}_price` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `product{i}_shipPrice` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default shipping price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `product{i}_id` | Integer | campaign product Id (found on campaign page) | N |
| `product{i}_qty` | Integer | quantity of product in order, defaults to quantity of 1 if not set | N |
| `variant{i}_id` | Integer | variant detail id(found on product page) | N |
|  |  |  |  |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
      "result":"SUCCESS",
      "message":{
          "priceDiscount":2,
          "shipDiscount":0
      }
}

```

#### Error

**Decline**

```
{
    "result": "ERROR",
    "message": "Invalid campaignId"
}

```

**Missing Fields**

```
{
    "result": "ERROR",
    "message": {
        "campaignId": "is a required field",
        "couponCode": "is a required field",
    }
}

```

The Resend Autoresponder API allows you to resend autoresponders through a simple HTTP POST request. **Purpose** The purpose of this endpoint is to resend autoresponders that may have been sent to the wrong email address or phone number. ### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | `autoresponderType` | ENUM -
`ORDER` ; `FULFILLMENT_TRACKING_ASSIGNED` ; `FULFILLMENT_SHIPPED` ; `FULFILLMENT_DELIVERED` ; `CANCELLATION` ; `PAUSE` ; `PREBILL_NOTIFICATION` ; `REBILL_DECLINED` ; `REFUND` ; `VOID` ; `TRIAL_COMPLETION` ; `REPEAT_CUSTOMER` ; `CUSTOM` | The event for the autoresponder | Y | | `fulfillmentId` | Integer (max 16 digits) | fulfillmentId returned by the Query Order API call | N | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API loginId provided by Konnektive | Y | | `orderId` | String (max 30 chars) | orderId returned by the query order API | Y - for Order Confirmation. If passed for Fulfillment Tracking Assigned, autoresponders for all fulfillments associated with that order are sent. | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Konnektive | Y | | `type` | ENUM - "SMS" or "EMAIL" | The contact method to use for the autoresponder | N - defaults to "EMAIL" | ### Sample Response #### Success ``` {"result":"SUCCESS","message": "Re-sent successfully."} ``` #### Error ``` { "result": "ERROR", "message": "Autoresponder not sent. Please verify setup." } ```

The Blacklist API allows you to add or remove a blacklist entry. ### Blacklist Fields Blacklists can be created by using different filters: by Card Bin, by Country/State, by Phone Number, by Email or by IP Address. Based on the filter selected, the required field is going to be the corresponding value. For example, if you wish to create a blacklist by Card Bin, then the cardBin field will be required. You can optionally include a specific customerId to cancel all subscriptions for that customer, but you must still specify the specific type of blacklist. To remove an entry you must pass remove = 1. ### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | `blacklistType` | Enum (`cardBin`/`stateCountry`/`emailAddress`,`phoneNumber`, or `ipAddress`) | Case sensitive field specifying the field used to blacklist | Y | | `cardBin` | Integer (6 chars) | 6 digit credit card bin | Y - if blacklistType is cardBin
N otherwise | | `country` | 2 character ISO country code | billing country | Y - if blacklistType is stateCountry or if removing a state
N - otherwise | | `customerId` | Integer | id from the customer query API call; specify if you want to cancel all current subscriptions for a customer. The blacklist entry itself is not specific to a customer. | N | | `emailAddress` | Must be a valid email address format | email address | Y - if blacklistType is emailAddress
N - otherwise | | `ipAddress` | Must be a valid ipv4 or ipv6 format | ip address | Y - if blacklistType is ipAddress
N - otherwise | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | | `phoneNumber` | May contain numeric digits and hyphens | phone number | Y - if blacklistType is phoneNumber
N - otherwise | | `productId` | Integer | specifying productId will limit the blacklist to a specific product. | N | | `state` | String (max: 3 chars) | billing state; abbreviated state code (varies from country to country) View full List . Optional if blacklistType is stateCountry. Leaving this field empty will blacklist an entire country. | N | | `remove` | BOOL("1", "0") | Remove a customer or blacklist entry from the blacklist | N | ### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": "Blacklist updated" } ``` #### Error **Invalid Fields** ``` { "result": "ERROR", "message": { "cardBin": "Must be a number" } } ``` ``` { "result": "ERROR", "message": { "emailAddress": "Not a valid email address" } } ``` **Missing Fields** ``` { "result": "ERROR", "message": { "emailAddress": "is a required field" } } ```

The Query Customer Contracts API returns the base64-encoded customer contract pdf file(s) based on order ID or customer ID.
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Descripion | Required | |------------|-----------------------|-----------------------------------------------|-------------------------------| | `customerId` | String (max 30 chars) | The customerId of an existing CRM customer. | Y, if no orderId is passed | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `orderId` | String The Add Customer Note API will allow you to add a note to a customer account.
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | |------------|------------------------|----------------------------------------------------|----------| | `customerId` | String (max 30 chars) | customerId returned by the query customer api call | Y | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `message` | String (max 500 chars) | The content of the note | Y | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | ### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": "" } ```

The Update Customer Card API will allow you to update customer credit card information.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `cardMonth` | Date (mm) | new credit card month of expiration | Y |
| `cardNumber` | Integer (max: 16 digits)-- must be a valid credit card number | new credit card number | Y |
| `cardYear` | Date (yyyy) | new credit card year of expiration | Y |
| `cardSecurityCode` | Integer (max: 4 digits) | new credit card security code |  |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `paySourceId` | Integer | The paySourceId returned by the Query Customers API call | Y - if updating existing card N - if adding a new card |
| `customerId` | Integer | The customerId returned by the Query Customers API call | Y - if adding new card for customer |
| `validateCard` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | If set will validate the Credit Card | N |
| makeDefault | Boolean ('1' or '0') | If set this card will be made the default | N |
| deletePaySource | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Delete the Pay Source from the customer | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": ""
}

 ```

The Update Customer API will allow you to update customer information.

### Custom Fields

Custom fields setup within the CRM campaign settings can also be imported with this api call. You do this by following these steps:

1. Take the field name and replace all spaces with underscores
    
2. Prefix the field name with the string "custom_"
    
3. Add the resulting string to the parameter list
    

#### (EXAMPLES)

"Pets Name" "custom_Pets_Name"

"Drivers License Number" "custom_Drivers_License_Number"

"hobbies" "custom_hobbies"

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `address1` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 1 of customer billing address, should include street address and number | N |
| `address2` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 2 of customer billing address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N |
| `city` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's city | N |
| `companyName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's company | N |
| `contactOptIn` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Customer has opted in to receive SMS communications | N |
| `emailOptIn` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Customer has opted in to receive email communications | N |
| `marketingOptIn` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Customer has opted in to receive email and SMS communications | N |
| `taxExemption` | String (max 50 chars) | Send this value 'exempt' if the customer is exempt from tax calculations | N |
| `country` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's billing country | N |
| `custom1` | String (max: 200 chars) | Custom value on customer record | N |
| `custom2` | String (max: 200 chars) | Custom value on customer record | N |
| `custom3` | String (max: 200 chars) | Custom value on customer record | N |
| `custom4` | String (max: 200 chars) | Custom value on customer record | N |
| `custom5` | String (max: 200 chars) | Custom value on customer record | N |
| `customerId` | String (max 30 chars) | customerId returned by the query customer api call | Y |
| `eCommerceLogin` | String (max: 45 chars) | customer's eCommerce login | N |
| `eCommercePassword` | String (max: 45 chars) | customer's eCommerce password | N |
| `emailAddress` | must be a valid email address format | customers email address | N |
| `firstName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's first name | N |
| `lastName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's last name | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `phoneNumber` | may contain numeric digits and hyphens | customers phone number | N |
| `postalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's billing postal code | N |
| `shipAddress1` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 1 of customer shipping address, should include street address and number | N |
| `shipAddress2` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 2 of customer shipping address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N |
| `shipCity` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's shipping city | N |
| `shipCompanyName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's ship to company | N |
| `shipCountry` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's shipping country | N |
| `shipFirstName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's ship to first name | N |
| `shipLastName` | String (max: 50 chars) | customer's ship to last name | N |
| `shipPostalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's shipping postal code | N |
| `shipState` | char-2 or char-6 depending on country | customer's shipping state, 2 character ISO codes for US states, foreign countries use country iso code + 3 digit number | N |
| `state` | char-2 or char-6 depending on country | customer's billing state, 2 character ISO codes for US states, foreign countries use country iso code + 3 digit number | N |
| `creditAmount` | Decimal | This amount will discount the next rebill | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": ""
}

 ```

The Delete Customer API will allow you to delete customer information through a simple HTTPS GET or POST request. Only customers that have exclusively partial orders may be deleted. At least one search parameter must be passed in.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `affId` | String (max: 20 chars) | affId returned by the order query or transaction query api calls, only records associated with this affId | N |
| `customerId` | Integer | customerId returned by the Query Customer API call | N |
| `campaignId` | Integer | Only records associated with this campaign | N |
| `endDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | Only records falling on or before this date | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Checkout Champ | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Checkout Champ | Y |
| `startDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | Only records falling on or after this date | N |

}

request.description:
The Query Customer API returns information about existing Customers. No wildcard characters need to be used as the api will insert wildcards automatically when necessary.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `address1` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 1 of customer billing address, should include street address and number | N |
| `address2` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 2 of customer billing address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N |
| `city` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's city | N |
| `companyName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's company | N |
| `country` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's billing country | N |
| `customerId` | String (max: 30 chars) | customerId returned by the Query Customer API call | N |
| `dateRangeType` | ENUM - dateCreated,dateUpdated,mostRecentActivity | defaults to dateCreated | N |
| `emailAddress` | must be a valid email address format | customers email address | N |
| `endDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or before this date | Y |
| `endTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or before this time. Must include endDate if passing this value. | N |
| `firstName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's first name | N |
| `ipAddress` | must be a valid ip format (xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx) | customers ip address | N |
| `includeBlacklist` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Return an indicator if the customer is blacklisted | N |
| `includeLifetimeValue` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Return the customer's lifetime value | N |
| `lastName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's last name | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `page` | Integer | which page of the query results to return | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `phoneNumber` | may contain numeric digits and hyphens | customers phone number | N |
| `postalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's billing postal code | N |
| `exactEmailMatch` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | only records with exact matching email address | N |
| `exactPhoneMatch` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | only records with exact matching phone number | N |
| `resultsPerPage` | Integer (max:200) | Number of results to return (defaults to 25) | N |
| `sortDir` | ENUM - 0,1 | 0 is descending, while 1 is ascending | N |
| `startDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or after this date | Y |
| `startTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or after this time. Must include startDate if passing this value. | N |
| `state` | char-2 or char-6 depending on country | customer's billing state, 2 character ISO codes for US states, foreign countries use country iso code + 3 digit number | N |
| `excludeHistory` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | if set customer history messages will be excluded from the query result | N |

### Sample Response

request.description:
The Query Transaction API returns information about all transactions recorded in the CRM. No wildcard characters need to be used as the api will insert wildcards automatically when necessary. ### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Descripion | Required | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | `achAccountNumber` | String (max 4 chars) | Last 4 of the checking account number | N | | `achRoutingNumber` | String (max 9 chars) | full bank routing number for check | N | | `address1` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 1 of customer billing address, should include street address and number | N | | `address2` | String (max: 30 chars) | line 2 of customer billing address (apt. number, suite number, etc) | N | | `affId` | String (max: 20 chars) | affId returned by the order query or transaction query api calls | N | | `authCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | The authorization code of a transaction | N | | `billType` | `NEW_SALE / RECURRING` | 'NEW_SALE' - only transactions with the initial billing.
'RECURRING' - transactions in the second or higher billing cycle.
(case sensitive) | N | | `billingCycleNumber` | Integer | The current billing cycle number of the purchase | N | | `campaignCategoryName` | String (max: 50 chars) | campaign category name | N | | `cardBin` | String (max: 6 chars) | The BIN # associated with the card (first 6 digits) | N | | `cardLast4` | String (max: 4 chars) | Last 4 numbers of the customer's credit card | N | | `cardType` | Enum ('VISA','MASTERCARD','DISCOVER','AMEX','TESTCARD') | Card type of the customer's credit card | N | | `city` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's city | N | | `clientTxnId` | String (max 32 chars) | The internal hexidecimal id assigned to the transaction by the CRM | N | | `companyName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's company | N | | `country` | 2 character ISO country code | customer's billing country | N | | `customerId` | Integer | customerId returned by customer query | Y | | `dateRangeType` | ENUM - dateCreated, dateUpdated, chargebackDate | defaults to dateCreated | N | | `emailAddress` | Must be a valid email address format | customers email address | N | | `endDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or before this date | Y - if customerId, purchaseId or orderId is not passed | | `endTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or before this time. Must include endDate if passing this value. | N | | `exTestCards` | Boolean | exclude Test Cards from the results | N | | `firstName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's first name | N | | `fraudPlugin` | String | Specify your Fraud Plugin (KOUNT, FRAUD MANAGER, MAXMIND, etc) | N | | `isChargedback` | Boolean | only return transactions that have been charged back | N | | `lastName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's last name | N | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `merchantId` | Integer | The Konnektive merchantId as specified in the CRM | N | | `merchantTxnId` | String (max 32 chars) | The id assigned to the transaction by the processor | N | | `orderId` | String (max 30 chars) | orderId returned by the import order api call | N | | `page` | Integer | which page of the query results to return | N | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | | `paySource` | `CREDITCARD / CHECK / PREPAID` | The source of payment | N | | `phoneNumber` | May contain numeric digits and hyphens | customers phone number | N | | `postalCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | customer's billing postal code | N | | `purchaseId` | String (max 30 chars) | purchaseId returned by the query purchases API | N | | `productId` | Int or Enum('OFFER','UPSALE') | The numeric konnektive campaign product id. Use OFFER to return all offers. Use UPSALE to return all upsells. | N | | `productName` | String | The display name of the campaign product | N | | `responseType` | `SUCCESS / HARD_DECLINE / SOFT_DECLINE` | the result of the transaction | N | | `resultsPerPage` | Integer (max:200) | Number of results to return (defaults to 25) | N | | `showExternal` | Boolean | includes transactions imported from an external source | N | | `sortDir` | ENUM - 0,1 | 0 is descending, while 1 is ascending | N | | `startDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or after this date | Y - if customerId, purchaseId or orderId is not passed | | `startTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or after this time. Must include startDate if passing this value. | N | | `state` | char-2 or char-6 depending on country | customer's billing state, 2 character ISO codes for US states, foreign countries use country iso code + 3 digit number | N | | `txnType` | `SALE / AUTHORIZE / CAPTURE / VOID / REFUND` | Type of transaction processed | N | | `utmCampaign` | String | Identifies a specific product promotion or strategic campaign. | N | | `utmContent` | String | Identifies what specifically was clicked to bring the user to the site, such as a banner ad or a text link. It is often used for A/B testing and content-targeted ads. | N | | `utmMedium` | String | Identifies what type of link was used, such as email or pay-per-click advertising. | N | | `utmSource` | String | Identifies which site sent the traffic, and is a required parameter. | N | | `utmTerm` | String | Identifies search terms. | N | ### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": { "totalResults": 721, "resultsPerPage": "25", "page": 1, "data": [ { "transactionId": 13977, "parentTxnId": null, "merchant": "NMI #
