request.description:
The Update Transaction API will allow you to update transaction information. This is used primarily for marking chargebacks through a simple HTTPS GET or POST request. This can also be used to update the refund reason for each transaction.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `chargebackAmount` | Decimal | The amount that was charged back. Uses the full transaction amount by default. | N |
| `chargebackDate` | Date (mm/dd/yyyy) | the date of the chargeback | Y - if markChargeback is true |
| `chargebackNote` | String (max 500 chars) | Any additional notes about the chargeback or chargeback reversion | N |
| `chargebackReasonCode` | String (max 10 chars) | reason code provided by the issuer | Y - if markChargeback is true |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `markChargeback` | Boolean (true or false) | If set to true, a chargeback will be marked or updated for the transaction | N\* |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `refundItemId` | Int | transactionItemId tied to the refund as returned by the order query or transaction query API call. For reporting purposes only. Note that if a transaction has been refunded multiple times, the refundItemId will be updated for all of the refunds. | N\* |
| `refundReason` | String (max 200 chars) | Update the refund reason for the transaction. Note that if a transaction has been refunded multiple times, the refundReason will be updated for all of the refunds. | N\* |
| `revertChargeback` | Boolean (true or false) | If set to true, any chargeback for the transaction will be reverted | N\* |
| `transactionId` | String (max 30 chars) | transactionId returned by the query transaction api call | Y |

\*At least one of these should be passed in, or the request will be invalid. If more than one is passed in, the API will do ONE of these actions with the following priority: marking a chargeback, reverting a chargeback, updating the refund data

### Sample Response

#### Success

``` json
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Transaction marked as chargedback."
}

 ```

The Transaction Refund API will allow you to issue partial and full refunds against a specific transaction.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `cancelPurchase` | Boolean (true or false) | If set to true, any purchase associated with the order will be cancelled. This is used with a full refund only. | N |
| `externalRefund` | Boolean (true or false) | If set to true, no requests will be made to the processor | N |
| `fullRefund` | Boolean (true or false) | If set to true, a full refund will be issued on the order | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `refundAmount` | Decimal | The dollar amount to refund | Y - if fullRefund is false |
| `refundItemId` | Int | transactionItemId tied to the refund as returned by the order query or transaction query API call. For reporting purposes only | N |
| `refundReason` | String | The reason for the refund | N |
| `refundMerchantTxnId` | String (max 50 chars) | If externalRefund is set to true, this sets the processor's Transaction Id of the refund | N |
| `returnDetails` | Boolean (true or false) | If set to true, the details of the refund transaction will be returned in the response. This is equivalent to the response provided by a transactions/query API call. | N |
| `transactionId` | List | transactionId returned by the query transaction api call | Y |
| `voidOnly` | Boolean (true or false) | If set to true, only a void request will be made to the processor, if possible. Refund requests are will not be made to the processor. | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Refund Successful"
}

 ```

#### Error

```
{
    "result": "ERROR",
    "message": "Could not issue refund. Processor returned: Do Not Honor"
}

 ```

The Composite Data Query API returns a data set combining information from the Transaction, Order, and Customer APIs.
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | |----------------|-----------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------| | `dateRangeType` | ENUM - dateCreated or dateUpdated | defaults to dateCreated | N | | `endDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or before this date | Y - if transaction IDs are not passed | | `endTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or before this time. Must include endDate if passing this value. | N | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | | `resultsPerPage` | Integer | Number of results to return (defaults to 25) | N | | `startDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or after this date | Y - if transaction IDs are not passed | | `startTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or after this time. Must include startDate if passing this value. | N | | `transactionId` | Integer or list | comma-separated list of transactionIds returned by the query transaction api call | Y - if date range not specified | | `cardLast4` | String (max 4 chars) | Last 4 numbers of the customer's credit card | N | | `cardBin` | String (max 6 chars) | The BIN # associated with the card (first 6 digits) | N | ### request.description:
The Transaction Range Select API returns the IDs of successful transactions within a specific date range. Unlike the Query Transaction API, this command accepts only a date range, and returns only transaction IDs, primarily for use in other API calls.
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | |----------------|-----------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------| | `dateRangeType` | ENUM - dateCreated or dateUpdated | defaults to dateCreated | N | | `endDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or before this date | Y | | `endTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or before this time. Must include endDate if passing this value. | N | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | | `resultsPerPage` | Integer | Number of results to return (defaults to 25) | N | | `startDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or after this date | Y | | `startTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or after this time. Must include startDate if passing this value. | N | | `cardLast4` | String (max 4 chars) | Last 4 numbers of the customer's credit card | N | | `cardBin` | String (max 6 chars) | The BIN # associated with the card (first 6 digits) | N | ### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": { "execTime": null, "memUsage": null, "totalResults": 20, "resultsPerPage": 25, "page": 1, "data": [ 863411, 863413, 863414, 863415, 863416, 863417, 863418, 863419, 863421, 863422, 863423, 863424, 863425, 863426, 863429, 863430, 863431, 863432, 863434, 863435 ], "params": null, "errors": null, "sortBy": "dateCreated", "sortDir": 1, "queryArgs": { "page": 1, "sortDir": 1, "resultsPerPage": 25, "sortBy": "dateCreated", "startDate": "9\/15\/16", "endDate": "9\/16\/16", "dateRangeType": "dateCreated", "dateCreated": [ { "date": "2016-09-15 00:00:00.000000", "timezone_type": 3, "timezone": "America\/New_York" }, { "date": "2016-09-16 00:00:00.000000", "timezone_type": 3, "timezone": "America\/New_York" } ] } } } ```

The Query Products API returns information about Products. The API can return campaign products or base products.

### Data Dictionary

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `allProducts` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Return all base products, instead of all campaign products | N |
| `campaignId` | Integer | CheckoutChamp campaign Id for campaign | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by CheckoutChamp | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by CheckoutChamp | Y |
| `productId` | Integer | CheckoutChamp product Id for one specific product | N |
| `productTags` | String (max 200 chars, comma-separated) | Return products with at least one matching tag | N |
| `comboProducts` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Return combo products | N |
| `rotationProducts` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Return rotation products and cycle | N |

### Sample Response

request.description:
The Create Product API can create base products to be used in offers and upsells.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `category` | String (max 50 chars) | Product's Category | N |
| `clientProductId` | String (max 30 chars) | Used to match this product against 3rd party data sources | N |
| `clubPluginId` | Integer | Set the club to the product (can be found on the plugin tile in the CRM) | N |
| `fulfillmentCycleType` | Enum (RECURRING, NO_SHIPPING) | (Defaults to RECURRING when not sent) | N |
| `fulfillmentDelayHours` | Integer | Number of hours to delay fulfillment | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id | Y |
| `msrp` | Decimal | The Manufacture's Suggested Retail Price | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password | Y |
| `productCategoryId` | Integer | Id of the category to assign a product (defaults to miscellaneous productCategoryId when not passed) | N |
| `productCost` | Decimal | Product cost (used to calculate expenses in reporting) | N |
| `productDescription` | String (max 5000 chars) | Product's Descrtiption | N |
| `productName` | String (max 100 chars) | Product's Name | Y |
| `productQty` | Integer | Quantity of the SKU per product purchased for which to request fulfillment (defaults to 1 via the database if not sent) | N |
| `productSku` | String (max 50 chars) | Products Stock Keeping Unit | N |
| `productTags` | String | Add tags to products (not case-sensitive) | N |
| `shippingCost` | Decimal | Shipping cost (used to calculate expenses in reporting) | N |
| `salestaxCode` | String (max 50 chars) | Product tax category at Avalara Tax or TaxJar | N |
| `stockQty` | Integer | The quantity of the SKU available for Fulfillment | N |
| `weight` | Decimal | Item weight per SKU in pounds | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS,",
    "message": {
        "productId": 15,
        "productName": "Super Cool Sunglasses"
    }
}

 ```

The Update Product API can update base products

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `bundleProductQty` | Integer | Total number of variants per bundle purchased | N |
| `category` | String (max 50 chars) | Product's Category | N |
| `clientProductId` | String (max 30 chars) | Used to match this product against 3rd party data sources | N |
| `clubPluginId` | Integer | Set the club to the product (can be found on the plugin tile in the CRM) | N |
| `fulfillmentCycleType` | Enum (RECURRING, NO_SHIPPING) | (Defaults to RECURRING when not sent) | N |
| `fulfillmentDelayHours` | Integer | Number of hours to delay fulfillment | N |
| `isVariantBundle` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Bundle multiple variants into a single item on an order | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id | Y |
| `msrp` | Decimal | The Manufacture's Suggested Retail Price | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password | Y |
| `productCategoryId` | Integer | Id of the category to assign a product (defaults to miscellaneous productCategoryId when not passed) | N |
| `productCost` | Decimal | Product cost (used to calculate expenses in reporting) | N |
| `productDescription` | String (max 5000 chars) | Product's Description | N |
| `productId` | Int (min 1) | Product's Id |  |
| `productName` | String (max 100 chars) | Product's Name | Y |
| `productQty` | Integer | Quantity of the SKU per product purchased for which to request fulfillment | N |
| `productSku` | String (max 50 chars) |  | N |
| `productTags` | String | Add tags to products (not case-sensitive) | N |
| salestaxCode | String (max 50 chars) | Product tax category at Avalara Tax or TaxJar | N |
| `shippingCost` | Decimal | Shipping cost (used to calculate expenses in reporting) | N |
| `stockQuantity` | Integer | The quantity of the SKU available for Fulfillment | N |
| `visible` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Product is available for a campaign (defaults to 1 if not sent) | N |
| `weight` | Decimal | Item weight per SKU in pounds | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS,",
    "message": {
        "productId": 15,
        "productName": "Super Cool Sunglasses"
    }
}

 ```

The Query Campaigns API returns information about Campaigns.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `campaignId` | Integer | Konnektive campaign Id for campaign | N |
| `campaignName` | String (max: 30 chars) | Name of campaign | N |
| `campaignOnly` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Limit results to campaign information only, without coupons, ship profiles, products, and other details. | N |
| `campaignProductId` | String | Comma-separated list of campaign product IDs to fetch from the specified campaignId. Leave blank to fetch all. | N |
| `campaignType` | Enum (`PHONE`,`ECOMMERCE`, or `LANDER`) | Campaign type | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `page` | Integer | which page of the query results to return | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `resultsPerPage` | Integer (max: 200) | Number of results to return (defaults to 25) | N |
| `showAllCampaigns` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Show all campaigns, live and deleted (overrides visible parameter) | N |
| `showAllProducts` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | List all products in campaign (including deleted) | N |
| `visible` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | 1 shows all live campaigns. 0 shows all deleted campaigns. (defaults to 1) | N |
| `includeAffiliates` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | 1 shows all affiliates in a campaign | N |

### Sample Response

            "dateRangeType": "dateCreated"
        }
    }
}

 ```

request.description:
The Create Campaigns API creates a single Campaign.

### Data Dictionary

| Field Name | Field Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `autoTax` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Automatic tax calculation | N |
| `blockChargebackBlacklist` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Transaction info will be checked against our global blacklist | N |
| `blockDebit` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Block debit cards | N |
| `blockMastercard` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Block card numbers from MasterCard | N |
| `blockPrepaid` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Reject any sales using a Prepaid Credit or Prepaid Debit Card | N |
| `blockVisa` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Block card numbers from Visa | N |
| `bundleFulfillment` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Bundle fulfillments that are within the designated hours of each other when they are shipped to the same customer | N |
| `campaignName` | String (max: 40 chars) | Name of the campaign | Y |
| `campaignTOS` | String (max: 2000 chars) | Campaign Terms of Service | N |
| `campaignType` | Enum("LANDER", "ECOMMERCE", "PHONE") | Type of campaign | N |
| `captureOnShipment` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Charges will be authorized at the time of the initial sale but only captured once the fulfillment has been updated with a tracking number | N |
| `codOrders` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Orders will be approved for shipment, and payment will be collected on delivery | N |
| `couponMax` | Integer | The maximum number of coupons allowed per order | N |
| `currency` | String (max: 3 chars) | The letter currency code set as the campaign's default currency | Y |
| `disableExternalPayments` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | This disables the "Prepaid" Order Entry payment option, which records payments taken outside the CRM system, such as mailed-in checks | N |
| `disableRecycleBilling` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Exclude this campaign from applying Recycle Billing profiles | N |
| `eSignature` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Requires an eSignature for terms of service, which are set in the Terms of Service | N |
| `insureShipBillerId` | Integer | shipping insurance is charged after order has shipped | N |
| `insureShipId` | Integer | shipping insurance is charged after order's fulfillment ships | N |
| `maxBundleHours` | Integer (min: 1 max:96 | Number of hours allowed between orders from the same customer before going to fulfillment (Default is 96) | N |
| `pinlessDebitRoute` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Route to pinless debit | N |
| `preauthOnly` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Only a single $1.00 authorization will be applied against the customer's card. This is generally used by call centers that are taking orders for third-party Gateways | N |
| `qaPercent` | Integer | Quality Assurance percentage rate | N |
| `reOrderDays` | Integer | Restrict customers from purchasing against this campaign again for the number of days | N |
| `requireQA` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | New orders are subjected to a Quality Assurance (QA) review based on the set percentage (Default QA percentage is 100%) | N |
| `requireTOS` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Requires customer agreement to Gateway's terms of service | N |
| `singleTransaction` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Combine all offers and upsells into one transaction | N |
| `taxServiceId` | Integer | Set the tax service plugin | N |
| `upsellWindow` | Integer | The number of minutes after the initial order to allow upsells This also controls wait time to send order confirmation autoresponders. (Default is 120) | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": {
        "campaignId": 15,
        "campaignName": "Coffee House"
    }
}

 ```

The Update Campaigns API updates a single Campaign.

### Data Dictionary

| Field Name | Field Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `autoTax` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Automatic tax calculation | N |
| `blockChargebackBlacklist` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Transaction info will be checked against our global blacklist | N |
| `blockDebit` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Block debit cards | N |
| `blockMastercard` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Block card numbers from MasterCard | N |
| `blockPrepaid` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Reject any sales using a Prepaid Credit or Prepaid Debit Card | N |
| `blockVisa` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Block card numbers from Visa | N |
| `bundleFulfillment` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Bundle fulfillments that are within the designated hours of each other when they are shipped to the same customer | N |
| `campaignId` | Integer(min:1) | Campaign Id of the campaign that is being updated | Y |
| `campaignName` | String (max: 40 chars) | Name of the campaign | N |
| `campaignTOS` | String (max: 2000 chars) | Campaign Terms of Service | N |
| `captureOnShipment` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Charges will be authorized at the time of the initial sale but only captured once the fulfillment has been updated with a tracking number | N |
| `codOrders` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Orders will be approved for shipment, and payment will be collected on delivery | N |
| `couponMax` | Integer | The maximum number of coupons allowed per order | N |
| `currency` | String (max: 3 chars) | The letter currency code set as the campaign's default currency | N |
| `disableExternalPayments` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | This disables the "Prepaid" Order Entry payment option, which records payments taken outside the CRM system, such as mailed-in checks | N |
| `disableRecycleBilling` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Exclude this campaign from applying Recycle Billing profiles | N |
| `eSignature` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Requires an eSignature for terms of service, which are set in the Terms of Service | N |
| `insureShipBillerId` | Integer | shipping insurance is charged after order has shipped | N |
| `insureShipId` | Integer | shipping insurance is charged after order's fulfillment ships | N |
| `insureShipLoadBalancerId` | Integer |  | N |
| `maxBundleHours` | Integer (min: 1 max:96 | Number of hours allowed between orders from the same customer before going to fulfillment (Default is 96) | N |
| `pinlessDebitRoute` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Route to pinless debit | N |
| `preauthOnly` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Only a single $1.00 authorization will be applied against the customer's card. This is generally used by call centers that are taking orders for third-party Gateways | N |
| `qaPercent` | Integer | Quality Assurance percentage rate | N |
| `reOrderDays` | Integer | Restrict customers from purchasing against this campaign again for the number of days | N |
| `requireQA` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | New orders are subjected to a Quality Assurance (QA) review based on the set percentage (Default QA percentage is 100%) | N |
| `requireTOS` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Requires customer agreement to Gateway's terms of service | N |
| `singleTransaction` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Combine all offers and upsells into one transaction | N |
| `taxServiceId` | Integer | Set the tax service plugin | N |
| `upsellWindow` | Integer | The number of minutes after the initial order to allow upsells This also controls wait time to send order confirmation autoresponders. (Default is 120) | N |
| `visible` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Soft delete the campaign (can be recovered in the CRM) | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": {
        "campaignId": 15,
        "campaignName": "Coffee House"
    }
}

 ```

The Create Campaign Product API can create products to be used as offers and upsells.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `acceleratedTrialMinutes` | Integer (min 1, max 1440) | Maximum to the number of minutes in a day | N |
| `allRebillCBP` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Chargeback Protection for all recurring billings. Pass 0 to use only for cycle 2 trial billings. (Not compatible with Hold Trial Charge trial settings.) | N |
| `billerId` | Integer | Shows products with at least one matching tag | N |
| `billingCycleType` | Enum (ONE_TIME, RECURRING, MULTI_PAY) | Returns all rotation products and cycle | N |
| `blockPrepaid` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Reject sales using prepaid credit/debit cards | N |
| `campaignId` | Integer (min 1) | Campaign Id for campaign | Y |
| `campaignProductQty` | Integer | Quantity per product (will override base product qty per order) | N |
| `compareAtPrice` | Decimal | Used to show a discounted price | N |
| `cycle{i}_billDelay` | Integer (min 1) | The amount of days a cycle is (i=cycle number) | N |
| `cycle{i}_combinationId` | Integer (min 0) | Combination product set to a cycle (i=cycle number) | N |
| `cycle{i}_isShippable` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Set as a shippable product (i=cycle number) | N |
| `cycle{i}_price` | Decimal | Product price for each cycle number (i=cycle number) | N |
| `cycle{i}_productId` | Integer (min 1) | The base product set to a cycle (i=cycle number) | N |
| `cycle{i}_shipPrice` | Decimal | Shipping price for each cycle number (i=cycle number) | N |
| `delayFulfillment` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Delay fulfillment after successful rebill | Y (if passing delayFulfillmentDays) |
| `delayFulfillmentDays` | Integer (min 1, max 10) | Number of days to delay fulfillment | N |
| `descriptor` | String (max 45) | Merchant descriptor for product | N |
| `displayName` | String (max 100) | Name showing on the campaign product | N |
| `finalBillingCycle` | Integer | Billing ends after the specified cycle. Set to zero, or do not pass in, if a final billing cycle is not required | N |
| `fixedBillingDay` | Integer | Regular monthly billing will always take place on the specified day of the month (set to 31 to always bill on the last day of the month) | N |
| `forceStandAlone` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Force item to always be billed as a stand-alone transaction | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id | Y |
| `maxOrderPrice` | Decimal | Max price the campaign product can be sold for | N |
| `maxOrderQty` | Integer | Max quantity allowed of this campaign product per order | N |
| `minOrderPrice` | Decimal | Min price the campaign product can be sold for | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password | Y |
| `persistentRebillDay` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Regular monthly billing on the same day of the month as the original purchase date | N |
| `pinlessDebitBillerId` | Integer | Pinless debit MID ID used with pinless debit routing | N |
| `productId` | Integer (min 1) | Product Id for one specific product | Y |
| `productType` | Enum (UPSALE, OFFER) | Returns all combo products | N |
| `showToAffiliates` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Show upsale on affiliate upsale report | N |
| `staggerBillIntervalCycles` | Integer (min 1) | Bill every {i} fulfillments | N |
| `staggerFulfillments` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Use if the billings and fulfillments are at different frequencies | N |
| `staggerIntervalCycles` | Integer (min 1) | Fulfill every {i} bill cycles | N |
| `staggerPayments` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Send fulfillments more frequently than you bill | N |
| `storefront` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Make product visible in the store | N |
| `trialAuthType` | Enum (HOLDTRIALCHARGE, FULLAUTHVOID, PREAUTH) | Hold Trial Charge: Authorize full product price and capture on 1st rebill. Full Authorize & Void: Authorize full product price but immediately void afterward. Validate Card: Free trials only - Authorize and immediately void on the card for $1.00. This should only be used to ensure the card is valid. Do not expect to capture for the amount authorized when using this trial type. | N |
| `trialCBPdelay` | Integer (min 1, max 10) | Number of days to wait to capture rebill transactions authorized via chargeback protection | N |
| `trialEnabled` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Enable trial for product (billingCycleType must be "RECURRING") | Y (if trial options are sent int) |
| `trialType` | Enum (STANDARD, ACCELERATED) | ACCELERATED trials will sale or capture cycle 2 transaction after set number of acceleratedTrialMinutes. STANDARD trials sale or capture cycle 2 transactions after set number of cycle1_billDelay days | N |
| `useOfferMid` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Process upsale using gateway account assigned to the offer (upsells only) | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": {
        "campaignProductId": 16,
        "displayName": "Very Cool Sunglasses"
    }
}

 ```

The Query Purchase API returns information about existing recurring purchases. No wildcard characters need to be used as the api will insert wildcards automatically when necessary.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `customerId` | Integer | customerId returned by customer query | Y |
| campaignCategoryName | String (max: 50 chars) | The Konnektive campaign category name. This search shows results that include your query. | N |
| `dateRangeType` | ENUM - dateCreated or dateUpdated or nextBillDate | defaults to dateCreated | N |
| `emailAddress` | Must be a valid email address format | customers email address | N |
| `endDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or before this date | Y - if customerId, purchaseId or orderId is not passed |
| `endTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or before this time. Must include endDate if passing this value. | N |
| `firstName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's first name | N |
| `lastName` | String (max: 30 chars) | customer's last name | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `nextBillDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | Billing date of next purchase | N |
| `orderId` | String (max 30 chars) | orderId of which the purchase was a part | N |
| `page` | Integer | which page of the query results to return | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `phoneNumber` | May contain numeric digits and hyphens | customers phone number | N |
| `purchaseId` | String (max 30 chars) | purchaseId returned by the query purchases API | N |
| `resultsPerPage` | Integer (max:200) | Number of results to return (defaults to 25) | N |
| `showExternal` | Boolean | includes purchases imported from an external source | N |
| `startDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or after this date | Y - if customerId, purchaseId or orderId is not passed |
| `startTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or after this time. Must include startDate if passing this value. | N |
| `status` | Enum ( 'ACTIVE','PAUSED','RECYCLE_BILLING','CANCELLED','RECYCLE_FAILED','TRIAL','COMPLETE') | Status of the purchase | N |

request.description:
The Update Purchase API will allow you to update purchase information.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `billingIntervalDays` | Integer | Number of days between each recurring bill | N |
| `billNow` | Boolean | Attempts to immediately bill the next recurring billing | N |
| `finalBillingCycle` | Integer | The final billing cycle for this purchase | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `newMerchantId` | Integer | A new Merchant ID (as specified within Konnektive CRM) that this purchase will be billed against | N |
| `nextBillDate` | Date (mm/dd/yyyy) | Sets the date of the next recurring billing | N |
| `password` | string (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `price` | Decimal | Sets the price of the next recurring billing | N |
| `productId` | Integer | Update to a new campaign product (found on campaign page) | N |
| `purchaseId` | String (max 30 chars) | purchaseId returned by the query purchases api call | Y |
| `reactivate` | Boolean | Reactivates a cancelled or inactive purchase | N |
| `shippingPrice` | Decimal | Sets the shipping price of the next recurring billing | N |
| `status` | ENUM - RECYCLE_BILLING, RECYCLE_FAILED | Update purchase status | N |
| `variantDetailId` | Integer | Update to a new variant (found on product page) | N |
| `productQty` | Integer | quantity for new product being updated | N - default 1 |
| `cancelFulfillment` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Choose to cancel fulfillment record tied to purchase | N |
| `fixedBillingDay` | Integer | Set the fixed day of future recurring billings. (The next rebill is excluded) | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": ""
}

 ```

The Cancel Purchase API will cancel an existing recurring purchase and optionally issue a refund.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `afterNextBill` | Boolean (true or false) | If set, the purchase will be cancelled after the next scheduled billing | N |
| `cancelAfterDate` | Date (mm/dd/yy) | The date on which to cancel | N |
| `cancelFulfillment` | Boolean (true or false) | If set, all fulfillments on hold for the purchase will be cancelled. All pending fulfillments will also be cancelled at the fulfillment house if the fulfillment house allows for cancellation updates. Defaults to `true` | N |
| `cancelReason` | String (max 100 chars) | Reason the order was cancelled | Y |
| `fullRefund` | Boolean (true or false) | If set to true, a full refund will be issued on the order | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `priorToNextBill` | Boolean (true or false) | If set, the purchase will be cancelled prior to the next scheduled billing | N |
| `purchaseId` | String (max 30 chars) | purchaseId returned by the query purchase api call | Y |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Purchase Cancelled"
}

```

The Konnektive Pause Purchase API will pause an existing recurring purchase.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `priorToNextBill` | Boolean (true or false) | If set to true, purchase will be paused prior to the next scheduled billing | N |
| `restartDate` | Date (mm/dd/yy) | The date on which to restart billing | Y |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `purchaseId` | String (max 30 chars) | purchaseId returned by the query purchase api call | Y |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Purchase Paused"
}

 ```

The Purchase Refund API will allow you to issue partial and full refunds against a continuity purchase's most recent billing.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `fullRefund` | Boolean (true or false) | If set to true, a full refund will be issued on the order | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `purchaseId` | String (max 30 chars) | purchaseId returned by the query purchase api call | Y |
| `refundAmount` | Decimal | The dollar amount to refund | Y - if fullRefund is not set to 1 |
| `refundAmount` | Int | transactionItemId tied to the refund as returned by the order query or transaction query API call. For reporting purposes only | N |
| `refundReason` | String | Reason for why the order is refunded | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": "Refund Successful"
}

 ```

### Purpose

The Create Coupon API allows you to add new coupons through a simple HTTP GET or POST request.

### Note

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `allCampaigns` | Boolean | allow this coupon to be used across all campaigns | N |
| `applyTo` | ENUM('SHIPPING';'BASE') | specify if coupon should apply to base price or shipping | Y |
| `campaignId` | Integer | Id of the campaign coupon should apply to | Y (N if passing in allCampaigns=1) |
| `countryCode` | String (max: 3 chars) | country that the coupon applies to | N |
| `couponCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | coupon code for newly created coupon | Y |
| `discount` | Decimal | coupon discount amount | Y (N if passing in isRecurring=1) |
| `discountType` | ENUM('FLAT';'PERCENT') | specify if the coupon should be a flat discount or percentage discount | Y |
| `endDate` | Date (mm/dd/yyyy) | the expiration date of the coupon | N |
| `isRecurring` | Boolean | is this a recurring coupon? | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Checkout Champ | Y |
| `maxCycles` | Integer | How many cycles should the coupon be valid for? | N (only applicable for recurring coupons) |
| `oneTimeCoupon` | Boolean | should this be a one time coupon? | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Checkout Champ | Y |
| `productId` | String (max 1000 chars) | comma-separated list of campaign product Ids that the coupon will apply to (omit if applying to whole order) | N (Y if passing in isRecurring=1) |
| `recurringDiscount` | Decimal | discount amount for recurring coupons | N (Y if passing in isRecurring=1) |
| `singleUse` | Boolean | should this be a single use coupon? | N |
| `startDate` | Date (mm/dd/yyyy) | the date on which to begin accepting the coupon | N |
| `zoneId` | Integer | zone that the coupon applies to | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
  "result": "SUCCESS",
  "message": {
    "coupon successfully created"
  }
}

 ```

### Purpose

The Query Coupon API allows you to query coupons in the CRM through a simple HTTP GET or POST request.

### Note

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `allCampaigns` | Boolean | allow this coupon to be used across all campaigns | N |
| `applyTo` | ENUM('SHIPPING';'BASE') | specify if coupon should apply to base price or shipping | Y |
| `campaignId` | Integer | Id of the campaign coupon should apply to | Y (N if passing in allCampaigns=1) |
| `clubId` | Integer | The club the coupon should apply to? | N |
| `countryCode` | String (max: 3 chars) | country that the coupon applies to | N |
| `couponCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | coupon code for newly created coupon | Y |
| `dateRangeType` | ENUM:('dateCreated'; 'dateUpdated') | date range of coupon | N |
| `discount` | Decimal | coupon discount amount | Y (N if passing in isRecurring=1) |
| `discountType` | ENUM('FLAT';'PERCENT') | specify if the coupon should be a flat discount or percentage discount | Y |
| `endDate` | Date (mm/dd/yyyy) | the expiration date of the coupon | N |
| `isRecurring` | Boolean | is this a recurring coupon? | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Checkout Champ | Y |
| `maxCycles` | Integer | How many cycles should the coupon be valid for? | N (only applicable for recurring coupons) |
| `oneTimeCoupon` | Boolean | should this be a one time coupon? | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Checkout Champ | Y |
| `productId` | String (max 1000 chars) | comma-separated list of campaign product Ids that the coupon will apply to (omit if applying to whole order) | N (Y if passing in isRecurring=1) |
| `recurringDiscount` | Decimal | discount amount for recurring coupons | N (Y if passing in isRecurring=1) |
| `resultsPerPage` | Integer | Number of results to return (defaults to 25) | N |
| `singleUse` | Boolean | should this be a single use coupon? | N |
| `sortDir` | ENUM(0;1) | discount amount for recurring coupons | N (Y if passing in isRecurring=1) |
| `startDate` | Date (mm/dd/yyyy) | the date on which to begin accepting the coupon | N |
| `zoneId` | Integer | zone that the coupon applies to | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
  "result": "SUCCESS",
  "message": {
    ""
  }
}

 ```

### Purpose

The Update Coupon API allows you to update or delete coupons in the CRM through a simple HTTP GET or POST request.

### Note

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `allCampaigns` | Boolean | allow this coupon to be used across all campaigns | N |
| `applyTo` | ENUM('SHIPPING';'BASE') | specify if coupon should apply to base price or shipping | Y |
| `campaignId` | Integer | Id of the campaign coupon should apply to | Y (N if passing in allCampaigns=1) |
| `clubId` | Integer | The club the coupon should apply to? (0 for all clubs, 'NULL' to turn off) | N |
| `countryCode` | String (max: 3 chars) | country that the coupon applies to | N |
| `couponCode` | String (max: 20 chars) | coupon code for newly created coupon | Y |
| `defaultCoupon` | Boolean | set this as the default coupon | N |
| `delete` | ENUM(1) | Delete the coupon | N |
| `discount` | Decimal | coupon discount amount | Y (N if passing in isRecurring=1) |
| `discountType` | ENUM('FLAT';'PERCENT') | specify if the coupon should be a flat discount or percentage discount | Y |
| `endDate` | Date (mm/dd/yyyy) | the expiration date of the coupon | N |
| `isRecurring` | Boolean | is this a recurring coupon? | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Checkout Champ | Y |
| `maxCycles` | Integer | How many cycles should the coupon be valid for? | N (only applicable for recurring coupons) |
| `oneTimeCoupon` | Boolean | should this be a one time coupon? | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Checkout Champ | Y |
| `productId` | String (max 1000 chars) | comma-separated list of campaign product Ids that the coupon will apply to (omit if applying to whole order) | N (Y if passing in isRecurring=1) |
| `recurringDiscount` | Decimal | discount amount for recurring coupons | N (Y if passing in isRecurring=1) |
| `singleUse` | Boolean | should this be a single use coupon? | N |
| `startDate` | Date (mm/dd/yyyy) | the date on which to begin accepting the coupon | N |
| `zoneId` | Integer | zone that the coupon applies to | N |
| `couponId` | Integer | numeric ID of the specific coupon being updated | N (Y if couponCode is linked to more than 1 couponId) |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
  "result": "SUCCESS",
  "message": {
    "Coupon updated successfully"
  }
}

 ```

### Purpose The Create Coupon Range Profile API allows you to create coupon range profiles in the CRM through a simple HTTP GET or POST request.
### Note
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | |----------------------|---------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------| | `couponId` | Integer | Id of the coupon the profile should apply to | Y | | `ruleType` |ENUM('AMOUNT','QUANTITY','BUY_X_GET_Y_AMT','BUY_X_GET_Y_QTY')| Type of coupon profile | Y | | `startValue` | Decimal | Starting value for the profile. This can be price or quantity based on ruleType. | Y | | `endValue` |Decimal | Ending value for the profile. This can be price or quantity based on ruleType. | Y | | `discount` | Decimal | Discount that should be applied | Y | | `product` | String (max 15 chars) | campaignProductId which is given the discount on a BUY_X_GET_Y coupon profile. The product Y in Buy X Get Y. Use SAME to give the discount on any of the coupon products. | N | | `productQty` | Integer | Product quantity which is given the discount on a BUY_X_GET_Y coupon profile. The quantity Y in Buy X Get Y. | N | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Checkout Champ| Y | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Checkout Champ| Y |
### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": { "Coupon profile successfully created" } } ```

### Purpose The Update Coupon Range Profile API allows you to update coupon range profiles in the CRM through a simple HTTP GET or POST request.
### Note
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | |----------------------|---------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------| | `couponId` | Integer | Id of the coupon the profile should apply to | Y | | `ruleId` |Integer| Id of the coupon profile being updated | Y | | `startValue` | Decimal | Starting value for the profile. This can be price or quantity based on ruleType. | Y | | `endValue` |Decimal | Ending value for the profile. This can be price or quantity based on ruleType. | Y | | `discount` | Decimal | Discount that should be applied | Y | | `product` | String (max 15 chars) | campaignProductId which is given the discount on a BUY_X_GET_Y coupon profile. The product Y in Buy X Get Y. Use SAME to give the discount on any of the coupon products. | N | | `productQty` | Integer | Product quantity which is given the discount on a BUY_X_GET_Y coupon profile. The quantity Y in Buy X Get Y. | N | | `delete` | ENUM('1','0')| Delete this specific coupon profile| N | | `deleteAll` | ENUM('1','0')| Delete all coupon profiles for this couponId | N | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Checkout Champ| Y | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Checkout Champ| Y |
### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": { "Coupon profile successfully updated" } } ```

The Import Click API allows you to track visits to your landing pages in the CRM Reporting.

On a successful Import Click call, the customer will be assigned a sessionId for their landing page session. This sessionId can be passed back on subsequent clicks to additional pages in the lander in order to track the timestamp of when each page was visited. When called from a Thank You page, this API will send confirmation emails and export the order to any applicable Data Source plugins. ### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | `campaignId` | Integer | Konnektive campaignId for which the order is being placed. | Y - if sessionId is not provided | | `fraudPixel` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | If set, this will return an iFrame (pixel) to put on the checkout page for fraud data collection. Currently integrated with Kount only | N | | `httpReferer` | String (max 200 chars) | The URI of the page that linked to this page. This will be blank if the user navigated to page directly, such as using a bookmark. | N | | `ipAddress` | Customers ip address | Must be a valid ipv4 or ipv6 format | N | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `pageType` | ENUM (`presellPage`, `leadPage`, `checkoutPage`, `upsellPage1`,`upsellPage2`, `upsellPage3`, `upsellPage4`, `thankyouPage`) | Which page in the funnel the user landed on | Y | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | | `requestUri` | String (max 5000 chars) | The URL that the user requested when they landed on the page(Ex. [https://mylander.com/nutra/?affId=AF54B33412&c1=fb&c2=5000234](https://mylander.com/nutra/?affId=AF54B33412&c1=fb&c2=5000234)) | Y - if sessionId is not provided | | `sessionId` | String (max 32 chars) | sessionId returned by a previous import click call | N | | `userAgent` | string (max 300 chars) | User Agent Header, used for reporting on browser and device type | N (recommended) | ### EXAMPLE FUNNEL API FLOW #### STEP 1: Lead Page Customer lands on the first page in the funnel, the "leadPage" and a click is imported. We save the returned sessionId to use again later. **Note:** It is important that this api call is only made once when the user first lands on the site, so make sure you are saving a value in your local session to prevent multiple import click calls from being executed. ##### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": { "sessionId": "f9e3eb14975b319afc10f0aa0ec8c813331c1f77", "pixel": false, "affVals": { "affId": "TEST", "c1": "[c1]", "c2": "[c2]", "c3": "[c3]" } } } ``` #### STEP 2: Checkout Page Customer lands on the second page in the funnel, the "checkoutPage" and a new click is imported with pageType=checkoutPage. We pass the api the sessionId that was originally returned from step 1. ##### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": "" } ``` #### STEP 3: Upsell Page 1 Customer lands on the third page in the funnel, the "upsellPage1" and a new click is imported with pageType=upsellPage1. We pass the api the sessionId that was originally returned from step 1. This can be repeated for additional upsells on upsellPage2, upsellPage3, and upsellPage4. ##### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": "" } ``` #### STEP 4: Thankyou Page Customer lands on the last page in the funnel, the "thankyouPage" and a new click is imported with pageType=thankyouPage. We pass the api the sessionId that was originally returned from step 1. ##### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": "" } ```

The Confirm Paypal API allows you to complete orders on your pages using the Paypal Express Checkout button.

### Test Card Fields

The following fields are used to set the products in the customer order: `product{i}_id`, `product{i}_qty`, `product{i}_price`, `products{i}_shipPrice`, where `{i}` is a sequential integer starting at the number 1.  
For 2 products in an order pass both `product1_id` and `product2_id`.  
For 3 products, pass `product1_id` , `product2_id` and `product3_id`.

### Custom Fields

Custom fields setup within the CRM campaign settings can also be imported with this api call. You do this by following these steps:

- Take the field name and replace all spaces with underscores
    
- Prefix the field name with the string "custom_"
    
- Add the resulting string to the parameter list
    

#### (EXAMPLES)

"Pets Name" "custom_Pets_Name"

"Drivers License Number" "custom_Drivers_License_Number"

"hobbies" "custom_hobbies"

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `campaignId` | String (max 32 chars) | campaignId for which the order is being placed | Y |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `orderId` | String (max 32 chars) | The orderId returned by a previous import lead call | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `payerId` | String (max 32 chars | PayPal Payer Id | Y |
| `paypalBillerId` | String (max 32 chars) | The MID of your paypal configured merchant | Y |
| `product{i}_id` | Integer | campaign product Id (found on campaign page) | Y |
| `product{i}_price` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `product{i}_qty` | Integer | quantity of product in order, defaults to quantity of 1 if not set | N |
| `product{i}_shipPrice` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default shipping price as setup in Konnektive CRM | N |
| `sessionId` | String (max 32 chars) | SessionId returned by a previous import click call | Y |
| `token` | String (max 32 chars) | PayPal Express token | Y |
| `couponCode` | String (max 50 chars) | coupon code for order discount as setup in Konnektive CRM | Y (if passed in via importOrder and not using Import Lead call) |
| `shipProfileId` | Integer | Ship Profile Id tied to campaign order is being placed against | Y (if passed in via importOrder and not using Import Lead call) |
| `salesTax` | Decimal (precision to two decimal places) | if set this will override the default sales tax | Y (if passed in via importOrder and not using Import Lead call) |
| `custom1` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom2` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom3` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom4` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| `custom5` | String (max 200 chars) | Custom value to store along with the order record | N |
| custom_order_{field_name} | String (max 500 characters) | Replace {field_name} with the Field Name you want to use for your order. If a custom field with that name does not exist, it will be created | N |

### Example Paypal Express Checkout Funnel

#### Step 1: Import Click

Customer lands on the first page in the funnel, the 'leadPage' and a click is imported using the import click endpoint. Only make this api call once when the user first lands on the site. The response from this call will contain a sessionId. Save this Id for step 2.

##### SUCCESS

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": {
        "sessionId": "a27dbdf0a6e047dc84c5cc542e7608c3"
    }
}

 ```

#### Step 2: Import Lead

Customer lands on the next page in the funnel, the "checkoutPage" and a new lead is created with the import lead api call. We pass the import lead api endpoint the sessionId that was originally returned from step 1. The response from a properly formed import lead call will contain an orderId. Save this value for step 3.

##### SUCCESS

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": {
        "orderId": "5FFF3B1F5D",
        "orderStatus": "PARTIAL",
        "campaignId": 6,
        "firstName": "Boss",
        "lastName": "Cat",
        "emailAddress": "BossCat@fakeemail.com",
        "phoneNumber": "1231231234",
        "shipAddress1": "100 Alley Cat Lane",
        "billShipSame": true,
        "shipCountry": "US",
        "sessionId": "a27dbdf0a6e047dc84c5cc542e7608c3",
        "userAgent": "Mozilla\/5.0 (X11; Linux i686) AppleWebKit\/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome\/57.0.2987.98 Safari\/537.36",
        "acceptHeader": "text\/html,application\/xhtml+xml,application\/xml;q=0.9,image\/webp,*\/*;q=0.8",
        "ipAddress": "107.142.169.24",
        "httpReferer": "https:\/\/myserver.com\/PAYPAL_TEST\/",
        "orderType": "NEW_SALE",
        "shipFirstName": "Boss",
        "shipLastName": "Cat",
        "customerId": 67,
        "agentUserId": 202,
        "dateUpdated": "2017-07-19 16:40:32"
    }
}

 ```

#### Step 3: Import Order

This is the part of your funnel that will contain the Paypal Express checkout button. It is important that you bind the Konnektive import order call to the Paypal checkout button: when your user clicks on that button a partial order will be sent to Konnektive and the user will be sent to Paypal. We pass the import order api endpoint the sessionId and orderId from the previous steps. There are three Paypal specific requirements that need to be passed to import order: paySource needs to be set to 'PAYPAL', paypalBillerId is your Paypal configured MID, and salesUrl is the url of the page in your funnel that Paypal will redirect to on a successful transaction.

##### SUCCESS

```

    "message": {
        "orderId": "5FFF3B1F5D",

#### Step 4: Finalize with Confirm Paypal Endpoint

If the customer successfully completes the transaction, they will be redirected by Paypal to your salesUrl from step 3 with a query string appended containing three parameters: paypalAccept, token, and PayerId. (Example: [https://myserver.com/PAYPAL_TEST/checkout.php?paypalAccept=1&token=EC-31442014591217430&PayerID=GC6MU6RAZE3TW](https://myserver.com/PAYPAL_TEST/checkout.php?paypalAccept=1&token=EC-31442014591217430&PayerID=GC6MU6RAZE3TW).) request.description:
The Club Member Login API allows you to login to a membership club.
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | |--------------|-----------------------|----------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------| | `clubId` | Integer | The id of the club as defined in Konnektive CRM | Y | | `clubPassword` | String (max 45 chars) | club password | Y | | `clubUsername` | String (max 45 chars) | club user name | Y-if memberId not provided | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `memberId` | String (max 40 chars) | memberId returned by the club membership query api | Y-if clubUsername not provided | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | ### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": { "memberId": "4C86420FC0", "status": "ACTIVE" } } ```
``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": { "memberId": "3H97826AR1", "status": "INACTIVE" } } ``` #### Unsuccess ``` { "result": "ERROR", "message": "Access Denied: Invalid member credentials" } ```

The Cancel Club Membership cancels existing club memberships.
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | |----------|-----------------------|-------------------------------------------------|----------| | `clubId` | Integer | The Id of the club as defined in konnektive CRM | Y | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `memberId` | String (max 32 chars) | memberId returned by the members query api | Y | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": "" } ```

The Query Customer API returns information about club memberships. No wildcard characters need to be used as the api will insert wildcards automatically when necessary.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `clubId` | Integer | The Id of the club as defined in konnektive CRM | Y |
| `customerId` | Integer | customerId returned by customer query | Y |
| `endDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or before this date | Y - if memberId, orderId, purchaseId, or customerId is not passed |
| `endTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or before this time. Must include endDate if passing this value. | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `memberId` | String (max 30 chars) | customer club memberId | N |
| `orderId` | String (max 30 chars) | orderId returned by order query | N |
| `page` | Integer | which page of the query results to return | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `productId` | Integer | product Id | N |
| `purchaseId` | String (max 30 chars) | purchaseId as returned by purchase query | N |
| `resultsPerPage` | Integer (max:200) | Number of results to return (defaults to 25) | N |
| `startDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only records falling on or after this date | Y - if memberId, orderId, purchaseId, or customerId is not passed |
| `startTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | only records falling on or after this time. Must include startDate if passing this value. | N |
| `dateRangeType` | enum (dateCreated, dateUpdated) | If provided, includes only records falling within startDate/startTime and endDate/endTime | N - defaults to dateCreated |

### Sample Response

#### Success

}

 ```

The Update Club Members API allows you to update club member information.
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | |----------|-----------------------|-------------------------------------------------|----------| | `clubId` | Integer | The Id of the club as defined in konnektive CRM | Y | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `memberId` | String (max 32 chars) | memberId returned by the members query api | Y | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | |`address1`| String (max 30 chars)| line 1 of customer billing address, should include street address and number| N| |`address2`| String (max 30 chars)| line 2 of customer billing address (apt. number, suite number, etc)| N| |`cellPhone`| May contain numeric digits and hyphens |customer's cell phone number| N| |`city` |String (max 30 chars)| customer's city| N| |`clubPassword`| String (max 45 chars)| club password| N| |`contactByEmail`| Boolean ('1' or '0')| contact member by email| N| |`contactByFax`| Boolean ('1' or '0')| contact member by fax| N| |`contactByMail`| Boolean ('1' or '0')| contact member by mail| N| |`contactByPhone`| Boolean ('1' or '0')| contact member by phone| N| |`country` |2 character ISO country code| customer's billing country| N| |`emailAddress`| Must be a valid email address format| customer's email address| N| |`phoneNumber`| May contain numeric digits and hyphens| customer's phone number| N| |`postalCode`| String (max 20 chars)| customer's billing postal code| N| |`state`| char-2 or char-6 depending on country| customer's billing state, 2 character ISO codes for US states, foreign countries use country iso code + 3 digit number| N| |`workPhone` |May contain numeric digits and hyphens| customer's work phone number| N|
### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": {} } ```

The Cancel Club Membership reactivates cancelled club memberships.
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | |----------|-----------------------|-------------------------------------------------|----------| | `clubId` | Integer | The Id of the club as defined in konnektive CRM | Y | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `memberId` | String (max 32 chars) | memberId returned by the members query api | Y | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": "Membership Reactivated" } ```

The Reset Membership API resets an existing club membership password.
### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | |--------------|-----------------------|-------------------------------------------------|----------| | `clubId` | Integer | The Id of the club as defined in Konnektive CRM | Y | | `clubUsername` | String (max 45 chars) | customer club user name | N | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `memberId` | String (max 30 chars) | customer club memberId | N | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y | ### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": "Your password has been reset. Please check your email" } ```

response.name: Reset Club Members

item.name: Affiliates

request.description:
### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `sourceId` | Int | Id of a particular affiliate you wish to obtain data for | Y (if not passing in campaignId or clientSourceId) |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Checkout Champ | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Checkout Champ | Y |
| `campaignId` | Int | campaignId where a particular affiliate resides in | Y (if not passing in sourceId or clientSourceId) |
| `clientSourceId` | String (max 20 chars) | Affiliate Id for Online Campaigns. This is the equivalent of affId on the Import Order API. | Y (if not passing in sourceId or campaignId) |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": [
        {
            "sourceId": 2,
            "sourceTitle": "affiliate-2",
            "clientSourceId": "7A199D29",
            "sourceValue1": "1",
            "sourceValue2": "2",
            "publisher": 2,
            "sourceValue3": "3",
            "subAffiliate": 3,
            "sourceValue4": "4",
            "sourceValue5": "5",
            "campaigns": [
                {
                    "campaignId": 1,
                    "campaignName": "ClickBank_USD"
                },
                {
                    "campaignId": 4,
                    "campaignName": "Main Campaign Test"
                },
                {
                    "campaignId": 5,
                    "campaignName": "Affiliate Test"
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}

```

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `campaignId` | Int | campaignId where a particular affiliate resides in (default will be all campaigns) | N |
| `cpcCommission` | Decimal | Commission paid for each Cost Per Click pixel that fires | N |
| `fireOnDeclineSave` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Fire pixels when an initially declined order is rerun successfully (only enable if the affiliate uses POSTBACK pixels) | N |
| `fireOnPrepaidCards` | Boolean (1 or 0) |  | N |
| `fireOnQA` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Prevent pixels from firing for this affiliate on pending orders until the order has been approved in QA (only enable if the affiliate uses POSTBACK pixels) | N |
| `hideRevenue` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Hide revenue columns from this affiliate on the Affiliate Report | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `publisher` | Int (min 1, max 5) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL (the numbered values correspond to the sourceValue1-5 parameters) | N |
| `rateType` | Enum (AMOUNT, PERCENT) | Pay a flat amount or percentage for each initial sale | N |
| `sourceTitle` | String (max 30 chars) | Title given to affiliate | N |
| `sourceValue1` | String (max 20 chars) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL | N |
| `sourceValue2` | String (max 20 chars) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL | N |
| `sourceValue3` | String (max 20 chars) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL | N |
| `sourceValue4` | String (max 20 chars) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL | N |
| `sourceValue5` | String (max 20 chars) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL | N |
| `splitType` | Int (min 1, max 2) | Split portion of the commission (1 for commission amount, 2 for commission percentage) | N |
| `step1Commission` | Decimal | Commission paid for each Cost Per Acquisition pixel that fires after the checkout page is submitted | N |
| `step2Commission` | Decimal | Commission paid for each Cost Per Acquisition pixel that fires for an upsell purchase | N |
| `subAffiliate` | Int (min 1, max 5) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL (the numbered values correspond to the sourceValue1-5 parameters) | N |
| `allCampaigns` | Boolean (1 or 0) | When set to 1, affiliate profile will be used for all campaigns. If 0, individual campaignIds must be assigned to the affiliate. | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": {
        "sourceId": 1,
        "clientSourceId": "E973441F",
        "sourceTitle": "affiliate-1",
        "crmUserId": ""
    }
}

 ```

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `campaignId` | Int | campaignId where a particular affiliate resides in (default will be all campaigns) | N |
| `cpcCommission` | Decimal | Commission paid for each Cost Per Click pixel that fires | N |
| `fireOnDeclineSave` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Fire pixels when an initially declined order is rerun successfully (only enable if the affiliate uses POSTBACK pixels) | N |
| `fireOnPrepaidCards` | Boolean (1 or 0) |  | N |
| `fireOnQA` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Prevent pixels from firing for this affiliate on pending orders until the order has been approved in QA (only enable if the affiliate uses POSTBACK pixels) | N |
| `hideRevenue` | Boolean (1 or 0) | Hide revenue columns from this affiliate on the Affiliate Report | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `publisher` | Int (min 1, max 5) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL (the numbered values correspond to the sourceValue1-5 parameters) | N |
| `rateType` | Enum (AMOUNT, PERCENT) | Pay a flat amount or percentage for each initial sale | N |
| `sourceTitle` | String (max 30 chars) | Title given to affiliate | N |
| `sourceValue1` | String (max 20 chars) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL | N |
| `sourceValue2` | String (max 20 chars) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL | N |
| `sourceValue3` | String (max 20 chars) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL | N |
| `sourceValue4` | String (max 20 chars) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL | N |
| `sourceValue5` | String (max 20 chars) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL | N |
| `splitType` | Int (min 1, max 2) | Split portion of the commission (1 for commission amount, 2 for commission percentage) | N |
| `step1Commission` | Decimal | Commission paid for each Cost Per Acquisition pixel that fires after the checkout page is submitted | N |
| `step2Commission` | Decimal | Commission paid for each Cost Per Acquisition pixel that fires for an upsell purchase | N |
| `subAffiliate` | Int (min 1, max 5) | Values that the affiliate will send with traffic via the tracking string attached to the end of your website URL (the numbered values correspond to the sourceValue1-5 parameters) | N |
| `allCampaigns` | Boolean (1 or 0) | When set to 1, affiliate profile will be used for all campaigns. If 0, individual campaignIds must be assigned to the affiliate. | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": {
        "sourceId": 1,
        "clientSourceId": "E973441F",
        "sourceTitle": "affiliate-1",
        "crmUserId": ""
    }
}

 ```

request.description:
The Query Mid Summary Report API returns summary report of mid information. No wildcard characters need to be used as the api will insert wildcards automatically when necessary.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `endDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only orders taken on or before this date | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | Api Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `midId` | Integer | MerchantId as setup in the Konnektive System | N |
| `page` | Integer | which page of the query results to return | N |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | Api password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `resultsPerPage` | Integer (max:200) | Number of results to return (defaults to 25) | N |
| `startDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only orders taken on or after this date | N |
| `excludeRecycles` | Boolean (1,0) | Will exclude mids with recycle attempts | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```

The Query Gateway API returns information about existing gateways through a simple HTTPS GET or POST request.

### Data Dictionary

| Field | Type | Description | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `billerId` | Integer | Konnektive biller Id for gateway | N |
| `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Konnektive | Y |
| `visible` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | 1 shows all live gateways. 0 shows all deleted gateways. (defaults to 1) | N |
| `enabled` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | 1 shows all enabled gateways. 0 shows all disabled gateways. (defaults to 1) |  |
| `gatewayName` | String (max 50 chars) | The name of the gateway in Konnektive | N |
| `title` | String (max 100 chars) | The assigned title of the gateway | N |

### Sample Response

#### Success

```
{
    "result": "SUCCESS",
    "message": {
        "billerId": 105,
        "title": "Test gateway 01",
        "enabled": 1,
        "acceptACH": 0,
        "directDebit": 0,
        "blockPrepaid": 0,
        "blockDebit": 0,
        "mastercard": 1,
        "visa": 1,
        "amex": 1,
        "discover": 1,
        "monthlyLimit": "0.00",
        "monthlyLimitHasRefunds": 0,
        "chargebackRatio": "0.000",
        "descriptor": "Descriptor",
        "midNumber": "123",
        "processorName": null,
        "txnFee": "0.00",
        "discountRate": "0.00",
        "reserveAccountRate": "0.00",
        "preAuthAmount": "1.00",
        "cs_phone": null,
        "cs_email": null,
        "cs_chargeback": null,
        "cs_url": null,
        "gatewayId": 223,
        "gatewayData": "{\"CompanyID\":\"CompanyID\",\"Password\":\"Password\",\"Hashcode\":\"Hashcode\"}",
        "visible": 1,
        "categoryCode": null,
        "bankName": null,
        "merchantCategoryId": 1,
        "pinlessDebit": 0,
        "subaccountId": null,
        "consentEnrolledDate": null,
        "merchantCategoryName": "PrimaCategory",
        "uniqueFields": "CompanyID:STR40\nPassword:STR40\nHashcode:STR40",
        "gatewayName": "Acquired3DS"
    }
}

 ```

request.description:
The Query Transaction Summary Report API returns the same data shown on the transaction summary report through a simple HTTPS GET or POST request. ### Data Dictionary | Field | Type | Description | Required | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | `dateRangeType` | enum (txnDate, orderDate) | Group report by date range type | N | | `campaignCategoryName` | String (max 50 chars) | The Konnektive campaign category name. This search shows results that include your query. | N | | `startDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | Only transactions processed on or after this date | Y | | `startTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | Only records falling on or after this time are retrieved | N | | `endDate` | String (mm/dd/yyyy) | only transactions processed on or before this date | Y | | `endTime` | String (hh:mm 24-hour format) | Only records falling on or before this time are retrieved | N | | `loginId` | String (max 32 chars) | API Login Id provided by Konnektive | Y | | `password` | String (max 32 chars) | API password provided by Konnektive | Y | | `reportType` | enum (campaign, source, gateway, product, campaignProduct, currency, date) | Group report by report type

Note: The 'date' report type will always segment dates based on Eastern time | Y | | `grpOrderDeclines` | Boolean ('1' or '0') | Group all declines on a single order as one decline | N | | `billType` | NEW_SALE / RECURRING | 'NEW_SALE' - only transactions with the initial billing.
'RECURRING' - transactions in the second or higher billing cycle.
(case sensitive) | N | | `cardType` | Enum ('VISA','MASTERCARD','DISCOVER','AMEX','TESTCARD') | Card type of the customer's credit card | N | | `utmCampaign` | String | Identifies a specific product promotion or strategic campaign. | N | | `utmContent` | String | Identifies what specifically was clicked to bring the user to the site, such as a banner ad or a text link. It is often used for A/B testing and content-targeted ads. | N | | `utmMedium` | String | Identifies what type of link was used, such as email or pay-per-click advertising. | N | | `utmSource` | String | Identifies which site sent the traffic, and is a required parameter. | N | | `utmTerm` | String | Identifies search terms. | N | ### Sample Response #### Success ``` { "result": "SUCCESS", "message": [ { "newSaleCnt": 0, "declinesCnt": 0, "approvedPerc": "0.00", "newSaleRev": "0.00", "rebillCnt": 1374, "rebillDeclinesCnt": 0, "rebillApprovedPerc": "100.00", "rebillRev": "112439.18", "salesTax": "15524.01", "surcharge": "0.00", "refundCnt": 0, "refundRev": "0.00", "expenses": "-107380.00", "chargebackCnt": 0, "chargebackRev": "0.00", "chargebackPerc": "0.00", "grossRevenue": "112439.18", "netRevenue": "5059.18", "currencySymbol": "$", "id": 4, "refundPerc": "0.00", "expenseDetails": { "discountPrice": "220.00", "shipDiscount": "0.00", "newSaleProductCost": "0.00", "rebillProductCost": "106990.00", "shippingCost": "390.00", "txnFee": "0.00", "discountFee": "0.00", "cbFee": "0.00", "rdrFee": "0.00", "commission": "0.00" }, "campaign": "Sports Goods" }, { "newSaleCnt": 0, "declinesCnt": 0, "approvedPerc": "0.00", "newSaleRev": "0.00", "rebillCnt": 144, "rebillDeclinesCnt": 0, "rebillApprovedPerc": "100.00", "rebillRev": "221947.65", "salesTax": "9551.16", "surcharge": "0.00", "refundCnt": 0, "refundRev": "0.00", "expenses": "-43720.00", "chargebackCnt": 0, "chargebackRev": "0.00", "chargebackPerc": "0.00", "grossRevenue": "221947.65", "netRevenue": "178227.65", "currencySymbol": "$", "id": 10, "refundPerc": "0.00", "expenseDetails": { "discountPrice": "0.00", "shipDiscount": "0.00", "newSaleProductCost": "0.00", "rebillProductCost": "43720.00", "shippingCost": "0.00", "txnFee": "0.00", "discountFee": "0.00", "cbFee": "0.00", "rdrFee": "0.00", "commission": "0.00" }, "campaign": "test campaign 10" } ] } ```
